title: Fullstack Software Engineer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Du har en lång erfarenhet av React och Java
* God erfarenhet av Azure PaaS-tjänster (t.ex. App Services, Azure Functions, Azure Storage, Azure SQL)
* Erfarenhet av API-utveckling
* God vana att arbeta i agila team (Scrum eller Kanban)
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD och versionshantering med Git
* Erfarenhet av Kubernetes i produktionsmiljö
* Erfarenhet av Docker för containerisering av applikationer


**Meriterande**
* Intresse för säkerhet i molnmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av monitorering/loggning med t.ex. Application Insights eller Log Analytics


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 02-04-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Creative Developers
description:
*MSAB is a global leader in digital forensic technology for mobile device examination and analysis. The MSAB vision is to empower every investigation with digital forensic solutions – for a safer world. A core value is to run an ethics-driven company with innovation and results. The sole focus of MSAB is on delivering high quality digital forensic solutions to collect, review, analyze and manage data. MSAB is a trusted partner to Law Enforcement, Defence Forces, Government Agencies and Forensic Laboratories in democratic countries throughout the world enabling them to investigate crime, gather intelligence, investigate fraud and fight corruption.*
 We love creating great code that matters - and the people who write it. We are always on the look-out for coders skilled in C++ or C# with innovative mindset.
   

  

 If you want to use your coding expertise and problem-solving mindset to make the world more transparent, safer, and more democratic? At MSAB, you can turn that ambition into reality.
   

  

 We’re a global leader in digital forensics, building advanced tools used worldwide to solve crimes, fight corruption, investigate fraud, and support justice. Here, your code has real-world impact.
   

  

**Possibilities**
 As a developer at MSAB, you’ll dive deep into complex and highly technical challenges - exactly the kind that motivate curious, inventive engineers.
   

  

**Your Work Might Involve**
* Extracting and decrypting data from mobile devices
* Writing decoders, parsers, and low-level implementations
* Reverse-engineering apps and making complex data structures readable
* Implementing efficient, high-performance code in C++
* Working close to hardware, embedded systems, Android, or iOS internals


 If that excites you - you’re exactly who we want to meet.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 Our culture is friendly, supportive, and built on shared learning and technical curiosity. You’ll thrive here if you enjoy autonomy, like exploring new ideas, and want to grow by stepping outside your comfort zone.
   

  

 There’s much more to tell you about our tech stack, vision, innovation and ways of working, and the opportunities ahead. But let’s save that for future conversations.
   

  

 Ready to build software that makes a real difference?
   

  

 Send your application today.
   

  

 For more information about MSAB, please visit: http://www.msab.com
   

  

 What we can offer
   

  

 Create a safer world with us!
   

  

 As one of the world’s leading digital forensics companies, MSAB leads the way in pioneering advancements that contribute to making our world safer.
   

  

 Your work at MSAB will bridge the gap between technology and justice. You will be inspired to go beyond your comfort zone, and you will deal with challenging and meaningful projects. When you join us, you become part of a global team that aspires to create a safer digital future, one breakthrough at a time.
   

  

 We can offer you an exciting work environment, where we value being innovative, acting ethically and delivering results in everything we do while our customers' needs are at the center. We are proud to be a fast-growing international company with more than 20+ nationalities and we work with things that really make a difference.
   

  

 Every day at MSAB is an opportunity to redefine the future of digital forensics.
   

  

 Are you up for the challenge?
   

  

 Department Development Locations Stockholm, Sweden Remote status Hybrid

title: Full Stack Software Engineer - Web & App
description:
**What We Do At Qliro**
 At Qliro we deliver safe and simple payments. We are a dedicated partner to our merchants who serve their customers every day. We believe that if our merchants grow, we grow. We are a company of dedicated, friendly and highly competent people that together have redefined what Qliro and payments can be. We are now on a journey of scaling our business both here in Sweden and the Nordics.
   

  

**What Your Team Does**
 The Web & App team is building the future of how users interact with Qliro across web and mobile. We develop and maintain a single, high-performing application—together with a .NET backend—that supports the full customer journey across multiple platforms.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer, you'll work across the stack, contributing to both frontend experiences and backend services. You'll help build scalable, user-friendly solutions while improving developer experience and overall product quality. Our goal is to remove friction and create world-class experiences that help Qliro grow to new heights 🚀
   

  

 We work in a modern, cloud-based environment with a strong focus on product thinking, developer experience, and great UX. You'll be joining a collaborative, international team that values learning, ownership, and having fun together. 🧩
   

  

**What You Will Get To Do**
 ✅ Building and maintaining a fullstack application (web, mobile, and backend) using modern technologies
   

  

 ✅ Developing and improving APIs and backend services in .NET
   

  

 ✅ Creating intuitive, scalable user experiences across platforms
   

  

 ✅ Collaborating closely with developers, product, and design
   

  

 ✅ Contributing to best practices, code quality, and continuous improvement
   

  

 ✅ A dedicated day every other week to be creative, experiment, and learn something new
   

  

 🛠️ Tech stack highlights: React Native, React, TypeScript, .NET (backend services & APIs), Docker / Docker Swarm, AWS, Terraform, React Native Testing Library / Cypress
   

  

**What You Bring To The Team**
* You are an experienced Full Stack Software Engineer and have worked with most of our tech stack
* You have practical experience from working with agile engineering methods
* We expect you to contribute to our technical solutions
* We believe you have an engineering diploma
* A good understanding of setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines—especially for mobile app releases—is a strong advantage due to the complexities of releasing React Native apps.
* You use AI to become more productive and solve problems


 Does this sound like your next role? What are you waiting for - apply now!
   

  

*Qliro is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to gender, gender identity or expression, national origin, religion or other beliefs, disability, sexual* 
 orientation
 *or age* 
 .

title: Java Developer
description:
At Qred, we’re building the bank for small businesses. Since launching 10 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for a Java Developer for the next phase of growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Java Developer at Qred, you will take end-to-end ownership of the backend systems that power our financial products. This role is a mission-critical bridge between complex third-party integrations and a seamless user experience, ensuring our technical execution directly drives business impact. You will work in a high-ownership environment where your contributions to architecture and scalability help define the future of our Financial Systems.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Build secure and scalable backend services using Java and Spring, ensuring a cohesive data flow across our ecosystem and PostgreSQL databases.
* Collaborate with other engineers, Product Manager and Tech Lead to define and implement efficient API endpoints and logic that optimize the user journey.
* Leverage AI-assisted development tools and MCP (Model Context Protocol) to accelerate feature discovery, technical implementation, and code quality.
* Monitor system health by maintaining robust logging, tracing, and alerting frameworks within AWS to ensure high availability in production.
* Contribute to a secure and compliant codebase by following established fintech best practices and peer-review workflows.


 What we're looking for
   

  

 We are looking for a developer with a structured approach to problem-solving and a proactive mindset toward professional growth. You thrive in a non-bureaucratic setting where you can drive alignment across teams and take pride in building scalable, long-term technical frameworks. You are an early adopter of agentic workflows, using AI agents to augment your precision and speed without sacrificing architectural integrity.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Several years of professional experience in backend development, it's a plus if you’ve worked within Fintech or similar regulated environments.
* Deep technical proficiency in Java, Spring, and JPA/Hibernate for robust data persistence.
* Experience managing and optimizing relational databases, specifically PostgreSQL.
* Hands-on experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS) for deploying and monitoring scalable services.
* Proficient in using AI-augmented tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or Claude Code to drive development efficiency.


 Why Qred?
   

  

 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

 One Last Thing
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. While we encourage a hybrid setup, we do expect you to be at least three days per week at the office. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: IT Developer
description:
What makes Cognizant a unique place to work? The combination of rapid growth and an international and innovative environment! This is creating lot of opportunities for people like YOU — people with an entrepreneurial spirit who want to make a difference in this world.
   

  

 Cognizant's delivery model infused with a distinct culture of high customer happiness. We consistently deliver positive relationships, cost reductions and business results. Are you ready to be a change-maker?
   

  

**Skills & Experience**
* Leading and managing a team of DevOps engineers.
* Implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines.
* Improving operational efficiency and infrastructure scalability.
* Collaborating with development and operations teams to ensure smooth production releases.
* Managing cloud infrastructure and ensuring high availability and disaster recovery.

**Requirements**

* Ability to analyze data and present insights to clients.
* Familiarity with modern software development methodologies, such as Agile and Scrum.

**What Can You Expect**
* Competitive compensation and benefits, based on your qualities and experience.
* Access to Udemy, Cognizant Academy digital libraries for your continuous learning.
* Organization driven by technology - we have a tremendous technology backbone.
* Shape your own career path by taking the lead of your own projects and managing your own solutions, being a corporate entrepreneur.
* We work in a hybrid mode.

title: Software Engineer - Workbench
description:
**About Applied Intuition**
 Applied Intuition, Inc. is powering the future of physical AI. Founded in 2017 and now valued at $15 billion, the Silicon Valley company is creating the digital infrastructure needed to bring intelligence to every moving machine on the planet. Applied Intuition services the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining and agriculture industries in three core areas: tools and infrastructure, operating systems, and autonomy. Eighteen of the top 20 global automakers, as well as the United States military and its allies, trust the company’s solutions to deliver physical intelligence. Applied Intuition is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, with offices in Washington, D.C.; San Diego; Ft. Walton Beach, Florida; Ann Arbor, Michigan; London; Stuttgart; Munich; Stockholm; Bangalore; Seoul; and Tokyo. Learn more at applied.co.
   

  

*We are an in-office company, and our expectation is that employees primarily work from their Applied Intuition office 5 days a week. However, we also recognize the importance of flexibility and trust our employees to manage their schedules responsibly. This may include occasional remote work, starting the day with morning meetings from home before heading to the office, or leaving earlier when needed to accommodate family commitments.*
 Meet our software engineers!
   

  

 Meet some of our software engineers who are shaping the future of autonomy and delivering world-class solutions helping customers shorten time to market. Hear about what brought them to Applied Intuition, what’s kept them interested, and their advice to potential candidates.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will streamline developer workflows and deployment infrastructure for complex automotive systems, identifying friction to improve velocity and reliability. By building robust
 **HIL/SIL** 
 validation pipelines and leveraging cloud-based
 **CI/CD** 
 , you will evolve the tooling and automation platforms necessary to scale modern embedded software development across the entire lifecycle.
   

  

 At Applied Intuition, you will:
   

  

* Design, build, and improve the tools, libraries, and frameworks for our engineering team
* Develop and evolve CI/CD pipelines for embedded and automotive software, including SIL and HIL test environments
* Build and test scalable tools for deploying to various automotive and cloud platforms
* Optimize our compile/build times using tools like Bazel, CMake, Docker
* Improve software deployment and data collection frameworks
* Identify and solve bottlenecks within our software stack


 We're looking for someone who has:
   

  

* 5+ years of relevant experience
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent
* Some experience using Python, Go, Java, or Kotlin
* Experience with CI, build, and deployment technologies like Bazel, Buildkite, Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins, and comfortability with scripting for automation
* Exposure to embedded, automotive, SIL/HIL, or hardware-adjacent environments is highly desirable
* Experience with Linux and/or ARM systems


 Nice to have:
   

  

* Experience using C and C++
* Experience working in automotive or related industries
* Experience with deploying software on either public clouds (e.g., AWS) or on-premise clusters


**Benefits and** 
**perks**
* Lunch and dinner allowance
* Fitness (600 USD) and learning stipends (1,000 USD) annually
* Stock options


 Compensation at Applied Intuition for eligible roles includes base salary, equity, and benefits. Base salary is a single component of the total compensation package, which may also include equity in the form of options and/or restricted stock units, comprehensive health, dental, vision, life and disability insurance coverage, learning and wellness stipends, and paid time off. Note that benefits are subject to change and may vary based on jurisdiction of employment.
   

  

 Applied Intuition pay ranges reflect the minimum and maximum intended target base salary for new hire salaries for the position. The actual base salary offered to a successful candidate will additionally be influenced by a variety of factors including experience, credentials & certifications, educational attainment, skill level requirements, interview performance, and the level and scope of the position.
   

  

 Please reference the job posting’s subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the location listed is: 511.200 - 1.098.200 SEK yearly.
   

  

*Don’t meet every single requirement? If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.*
*Applied Intuition is an equal opportunity employer and federal contractor or subcontractor. Consequently, the parties agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of 41 CFR 60-1.4(a), 41 CFR 60-300.5(a) and 41 CFR 60-741.5(a) and that these laws are incorporated herein by reference. These regulations prohibit discrimination against qualified individuals based on their status as protected veterans or individuals with disabilities, and prohibit discrimination against all individuals based on their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or national origin. These regulations require that covered prime contractors and subcontractors take affirmative action to employ and advance in employment individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status or disability. The parties also agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of Executive Order 13496 (29 CFR Part 471, Appendix A to Subpart A), relating to the notice of employee rights under federal labor laws.*

title: Backend Engineer, Retail Solutions, Solna/Hybrid
description:
We are building the essential Retail solutions used at thousands of servicepoints across the Nordics. By providing our network partners with the most intuitive and reliable tools on the market, we play an integral role in PostNord’s growth.
   

  

 Through user-centric mobile applications and a cloud-based architecture, we enable millions of customer interactions every year.
   

  

 Our team proudly takes the lead on developing creative and scalable solutions to re-shape the user experience at our physical locations. We are now looking for a Backend Engineer to join us on this journey!
   

  

 You are a software developer who cares deeply for building creative and innovative solutions by applying your technical skills to solve actual business needs. You are a team player of the highest degree and show great commitment to both your team members and your product.
   

  

 ,
   

  

* Driven developer with strong TypeScript and at least 3 years of backend experience
* Proven track record across complex projects as a software engineer
* System Thinking: Design with a holistic approach
* Clear and confident communication
* Collaboration to foster dialogue and improve the team
* Someone that wants to take responsibility and grow - not just close tickets


**We offer**
* A flexible hybrid workplace from our headquarter in Solna, Stockholm
* Development and career opportunities
* Great insurance and pension conditions
* Wellness allowance and access to office gym and swimming pool
* Employee benefits through PostNord’s own employee foundation PostNord Plus


**We make everyday life easier**
 PostNord is the leading supplier of communication, logistics and postal service solutions to, from, and within the Nordic region. We aim to make everyday life easier and more sustainable for everyone who lives and works in the Nordic region. We are accountable, brave and committed, effectively leading change regardless of if we lead our self or others. We emphasize teamwork, sincerity and positive relationships in the workplace. We build on our success and learn from both colleagues and mistakes. People with different backgrounds work with us. You will therefore be part of a workplace with great diversity, which contributes to better results for the business. Visit us at www.postnord.com
   

  

**Apply**
 What are you waiting for? Send in your application. Selection is ongoing, so apply as soon as possible. If you have any questions, do not hesitate to contact manager malin.rydman@postnord.com
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Cloud engineer
description:
**Do you possess a deep understanding of how business change, new technologies and advanced cloud and infrastructure paradigms impact and transform the IT landscape?**
 The Cloud Infrastructure Engineering department in Sweden is looking for a Cloud Engineer who will use knowledge and skills to challenge your teammates and leaders to innovate on extensive existing knowledge and expertise to provide sustainable disrupting solutions, exceeding industry standards, to our clients.
   

  

**Infrastructure Engineering – your new department** 
 You will join more than 20 highly skilled and equally motivated colleagues in Sweden. We are part of Accenture Technology which consists of 400+ colleagues and just like the rest of Accenture, we work across industries. We simply assemble the best possible team for any given project. Our skills cover all kinds of technologies as well as methodologies and this combination makes us a wanted resource and valued contributor across all projects in Accenture. Private, public, small, big or even enormous. Doesn’t matter. We are ready, and we can be so because we foster a positive environment built on knowledge sharing, cooperation, and on-going development.
   

  

**As a Cloud Expert/Engineer, you will be:** 
 Using your knowledge and skills to challenge your teammates and leaders to innovate on extensive existing knowledge and expertise to provide sustainable disrupting solutions, exceeding industry standards, to our clients. This could take the form of:
   

  

  

- Client workshops where we share our knowledge, plan and/or design solutions for our clients

- Designing, provisioning and/or securing cloud architectures for global and local business critical systems for our clients

- Bringing your skills to our clients by orchestrating and automating environments for a proof-of-concept demo or even getting ready for a production deployment

- Engaging in architecture or other training as a student or faculty  In all of this, you can rest assured that Accenture have high ethical standards which make you proud to work for an organization like this which also cares first and foremost for our people.

**We believe:** 
 You are passionate about technology and its adoption. You have a strong background in IT infrastructure and are, or want to become, an expert within on-prem, cloud and hybrid cloud solutions, working with the major cloud providers such as Microsoft, AWS, Google and others.
   

  

 You are a team player with a focus on delivery with excellent communication and people skills.
   

  

**Here’s what you need:**
- An academic degree, preferably at Master’s level or equivalent experience

- 2-5 years’ experience working with one or more cloud providers’ technologies such as AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, or on-prem technologies

- Experience as a developer and/or technical architect

- Experience with infrastructure and thinks about automation in all stages of the construction and deployment processes

- Worked according to agile methods, DevOps and principles from Lean

- The ability to articulate your knowledge to not only other technical people, but also to non-technical business focused people and help them understand what the technology would mean to them and why they should care

- An understanding of Cloud Native development practices

- Experience working with infrastructure transformation and/or cloud transformation

- Experience with cloud ecosystems, from transforming requirements into design all the way down to operations

- Excellent communication and people skills

- Fluency in Swedish and English is must, both spoken and written

**Bonus points if you have knowledge/experience in:**
- Microservice architecture

- Design and scaling of IT systems

- CI/CD, automation and security

- Container platforms such as OpenShift, Google Anthos, Azure Kubernetes service, VMware Tanzu

- Integration architecture and integration/event solutions such as Cloud Suppliers Integration Services, Kafka, JBoss Fuse, Solace, Mule ESB

- API and Event driven architecture

- Technical architecture-standards, security and frameworks

- Infra as a code, security controls, monitoring tools, DevOps-tools and services such as GitHub, Azure DevOps, Ant, Maven, Chef, Docker, Git, Jenkins

- Consulting or client service delivery

**How’s it like working for Accenture?** 
 To give you a clearer impression of who we are and what we're looking for, we've asked Michael Nabb to tell us a bit about a career at Accenture:
   

  

 I’ve been with the firm for more than seveteen years and what has been consistent throughout those years has been a close collaboration with clients to help them achieve their goals. I’ve helped some of the largest businesses in the Nordics adapt to a changing world by introducing new technologies or improving the usage of existing ones. I look back and feel proud about playing an important part in the success of our clients.
   

  

 Besides the delivery aspect Accenture has a very strong internal community with groups of interests as diverse as games, art, dance and all sorts of sports which I’ve personally enjoyed having participated in over the years.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
- Truly competitive salary terms, bonus schemes, pension, health insurance, employee stock purchase program etc.

- Flexible workload – you have control over your everyday life

- Hybrid ways of working depending on client needs

- Work in a team dedicated to complex problem solving within supply chain and operations, working in a range of industries and projects

- Work alongside leading Nordic and global subject matter experts

**Interested?** 
 If you have any questions regarding the role or the Cloud Infrastructure Engineering department, please contact Michael Nabb, Cloud Advisory Senior Manager at michael.nabb@accenture.com. For questions regarding the position or the recruitment process please contact Lina Zangana, Lina.zangana@accenture.com.

title: Senior Mobile Engineer - User Platform
description:
We are looking for dedicated, engaged software engineers that are passionate about working on highly available, low latency client SDKs and the related backend services in the authorization and configuration domains to join our teams. These form the backbone of our product experience for hundreds of millions of users worldwide. You’ll be directly helping with the evolution of Spotify’s overall authentication and session management infrastructure.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Be part of an autonomous and cross functional team of Mobile and Backend Engineers along with members from Product, Design and Insights to identify and tackle important problems in the Authentication and Session Management domains.
* Build highly scalable backend services and SDKs that bring the happiness of music to millions of users.
* Write clean and maintainable code that will scale across a number of projects and distributed development teams
* Share knowledge, promote best practices, and collaborate with some of the best engineers in the company
* Improve developer experience, the team is driven by a strong focus on clean APIs and engineering efficiency


 Who You Are
   

  

* You enjoy solving problems end to end and if needed proactively learn the skills needed to solve them.
* You are proficient in C++ and Java, including modern C++ standards.
* Experience in iOS (Objective C / Swift) or Android (Kotlin) development is a plus.
* You are an inclusive colleague and a true phenomenal teammate.
* You have experience with strong testing practices, A/B testing or CI/CD
* You're passionate about your work, striving towards the goals of the team and, ultimately, the Spotify mission - “giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the opportunity to enjoy and be passionate about it"


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in-person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Cloud Engineer/Architect
description:
Do you have a genuine interest in how business change, new technologies, evolving cloud and infrastructure solutions that help shape the IT landscape?
   

  

 Software & Platform Engineering – your new department:
   

  

 You will become part of a welcoming team of more than 40 highly skilled and engaged colleagues across Sweden. As part of Accenture Technology, a community of 400+ professionals, we collaborate across industries and bring together the right mix of skills for each unique assignment.
   

  

 Our strength lies in the diversity of our experience across technologies, methods, and perspectives and in how we support one another. This makes us a trusted and appreciated partner throughout Accenture’s projects, regardless of size or complexity. Whether the challenge is small or large, local or global, we approach our work with curiosity, care, and confidence. We foster an environment rooted in knowledge sharing, collaboration, and continuous learning, where people are encouraged to grow and succeed together.
   

  

 Use your knowledge and experience to collaborate closely with colleagues and leaders, contributing thoughtfully to innovation and helping shape sustainable, high‑quality solutions for our clients. Your work may include:
   

  

  

- Facilitating client workshops where we share knowledge and work together to explore, plan, and design solutions

- Designing, provisioning, and securing cloud architectures for both global and local business‑critical systems

- Supporting our clients by orchestrating and automating environments from proof‑of‑concept initiatives to production‑ready deployments

- Taking part in architecture and other learning initiatives, both as a learner and by sharing your expertise with others

 Throughout all of this, you will be part of an organization with strong ethical values one that takes pride in its work and places the well‑being and development of its people at the heart of everything it does.
   

  

 We believe: You are passionate about technology and its adoption. You have a strong background in IT infrastructure and are, or want to become, an expert within on-prem, cloud and hybrid cloud solutions, working with the major cloud providers such as Microsoft, AWS, Google and others.
   

  

 You are a team player with a focus on delivery with excellent communication and people skills.
   

  

 Here’s what you need:
   

  

  

- An academic degree, preferably at Master’s level or equivalent experience

- 2-5 years’ experience working with one or more cloud providers’ technologies such as AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, or on-prem technologies

- Experience with cloud ecosystems, from transforming requirements into design all the way down to operations

- Experience as a developer and/or technical architect

- Experience with infrastructure and thinks about automation in all stages of the construction and deployment processes

- The ability to articulate your knowledge to not only other technical people, but also to non-technical business focused people and help them understand what the technology would mean to them and why they should care

- Fluency in Swedish and English is a must, both spoken and written

 Bonus points if you have knowledge/experience in:
   

  

  

- Microservice architecture

- Design and scaling of IT systems

- CI/CD, automation and security

- Container platforms such as OpenShift, Google Anthos, Azure Kubernetes service, VMware Tanzu

- Integration architecture and integration/event solutions such as Cloud Suppliers Integration Services, Kafka, JBoss Fuse, Solace, Mule ESB

- API and Event driven architecture

- Technical architecture-standards, security and frameworks

- Infrastructure as Code (IaC), security controls, monitoring tools, DevOps-tools and services such as GitHub, Azure DevOps, Ant, Maven, Chef, Docker, Git, Jenkins

- Consulting or client service delivery

 How’s it like working for Accenture?  To give you a clearer impression of who we are and what we're looking for, we've asked Michael Nabb to tell us a bit about a career at Accenture:
   

  

*I’ve been with the firm for more than seventeen years and what has been consistent throughout those years has been a close collaboration with clients to help them achieve their goals. I’ve helped some of the largest businesses in the Nordics adapt to a changing world by introducing new technologies or improving the usage of existing ones. I look back and feel proud about playing an important part in the success of our clients.*
*Besides the delivery aspect Accenture has a very strong internal community with groups of interests as diverse as games, art, dance and all sorts of sports which I’ve personally enjoyed having participated in over the years.*
 What do we offer?
   

  

 Our dynamic offices offer a work environment where we enjoy spending time together whether through knowledge‑sharing evenings, breakfasts in the city, or social activities that strengthen our sense of community. With us, you have the opportunity to grow both professionally and personally, and we place strong emphasis on your development and well‑being.
   

  

 Our employees enjoy benefits such as a wellness allowance, health insurance, occupational pension, and enhanced parental leave.
   

  

 We also have our own sports association, Accenture IF, offering activities ranging from ball sports and climbing to sports trips and much more.
   

  

 Accenture’s internal women’s network, WISE (Women In Sweden), aims to engage and empower members while building a strong network across Accenture Sweden.
   

  

 You also have the opportunity to work in a hybrid or remote setup, depending on your assignments. We believe in maintaining a healthy work–life balance and making sure that life outside of work fits together smoothly. Flexible workload – you have control over your everyday life.
   

  

 Interested? If you have any questions regarding the role or the Software & Platform Engineering department, please contact Mathias Wiberg at mathias.wiberg@accenture.com . For questions regarding the position or the recruitment process please contact Lina Zangana, Lina.zangana@accenture.com.

title: Utvecklare Dynamics 365 F&O
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Om oss**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande konsult- och managementbolag inom digital transformation med tusentals medarbetare i Norden och Europa. Vi har flera år i rad utsetts till en av “Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser” av Great Place to Work och rankas av Gartner som ett av de fem främsta företagen inom digital transformation.
   

  

 Bland annat hjälper vi företag att effektivisera och automatisera sina affärsprocesser, från ekonomi och försäljning till produktion, drift och analys. Vi är stolta över att ha byggt ett starkt erbjudande inom ERP och Business Platforms, där vi erbjuder allt från rådgivning och implementation till långsiktig förvaltning.
   

  

 Vi är på tillväxtresa! Som en del i vår tillväxt vill vi stärka vårt team inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 ERP. Här får du vara med och leverera affärssystemslösningar som verkligen gör skillnad — från rådgivning och systemutveckling till implementering och långsiktig förvaltning. Nu söker vi en
 **Utvecklare Dynamics 365 F&O** 
 som vill vara med och skapa affärsvärde på riktigt.
   

  

**Som utvecklare...**
* i Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations kommer du att ansvara för att utveckla och integrera affärslösningar för kunder inom olika branscher. Du arbetar nära verksamhet och arkitekter för att förverkliga kundernas visioner och för att koppla samman Dynamics 365 F&O med andra system för att säkra effektiva och sömlösa affärsflöden, från första idé till färdig lösning.


**Mer konkret…**
 …kommer du att vara involverad i flera spännande projekt där du bland annat arbetar med:
   

  

* Utveckling och anpassning av funktionalitet i Dynamics 365 F&O med X++ och C#.
* Skapande och hantering av integrationer, t.ex. Azure Integration Services, för att koppla Dynamics med externa system.
* Design och hantering av integrationer (t.ex. Azure Integration Services och REST-API:er) för koppling mellan Dynamics och externa system.
* Delta i förstudier och workshops med kunder för att fånga krav och bidra till lösningsdesign.
* Testning och validering av utvecklade lösningar för att säkerställa att de möter både tekniska och verksamhetsmässiga krav.


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har minst 3 års erfarenhet som utvecklare med Dynamics 365 F&O.
* Väl insatt och bekväm med X++, C# och Azure Integration Services.
* Har erfarenhet av integrationer mellan Dynamics 365 F&O och andra system — gärna via REST API.
* Har ett starkt intresse för teknisk utveckling och för att skapa lösningar som effektiviserar affärsprocesser.


**Varför Sopra Steria?**
 Hos oss får du arbeta i en inkluderande och utvecklande miljö med några av branschens främsta experter. Vi erbjuder spännande kunduppdrag, kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och goda karriärmöjligheter – i ett bolag där människan alltid står i centrum.
   

  

 Hos Sopra Steria får du mer än ett jobb, du får en karriärresa.
   

  

* Bli en del av ett toppteam: Arbeta sida vid sida med några av marknadens mest erfarna experter inom affärssystem och integration.
* Utvecklas på riktigt: Vi satsar stort på kompetensutveckling, certifieringar och personlig utveckling.
* Jobba med projekt som utmanar: Våra kunder spänner över många branscher och våra uppdrag varierar från komplexa transformationer till nyskapande lösningar på marknadens modernaste plattformar.
* Kultur som folk faktiskt trivs i: Vi är stolta över en arbetsmiljö där kollegor stöttar varandra, idéer välkomnas och där det är roligt att gå till jobbet.

title: Specialist Solution Engineer - Sweden
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Salesforce** 
 is looking for a motivated and technically strong
 **Solution Engineer** 
 based in Stockholm to join our
 **Marketing Cloud** 
 team in Northern Europe. In this role, you will help customers solve digital marketing challenges by connecting business needs with scalable technology solutions across the MarTech landscape.
   

  

 You will work closely with Account Executives, customers, and internal technical teams to design and demonstrate solutions based on Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP), and related marketing technologies. This role is ideal for someone who combines a strong technical foundation with practical MarTech knowledge and enjoys translating customer requirements into solution designs that support personalized, data-driven engagement.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Business Problem Solving: Take on complex business challenges, utilizing research and business assessment to define problems, generate innovative ideas, identify opportunities, and recommend actionable next steps.
* Technical Solution Design: Work with customers and internal teams to understand marketing, data, and activation requirements and translate them into solution designs using Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP), and adjacent MarTech capabilities.
* MarTech Consulting: Support customers in evaluating and improving their marketing technology setup, including customer data usage, campaign orchestration, segmentation, personalization, and channel execution.
* Solution Demonstrations & Prototyping: Deliver clear and relevant product demonstrations, build lightweight prototypes, and show how Salesforce solutions can address real customer use cases across the marketing lifecycle.
* Data & Integration Understanding: Contribute to solution discussions around integrations, APIs, data flows, identity resolution, and activation use cases. Help customers understand how Marketing Cloud and Data360 (CDP) fit into their broader technology ecosystem.
* Discovery & Technical Validation: Participate in discovery sessions to capture business and technical requirements, assess feasibility, and support the development of solution recommendations aligned to customer goals.
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with sales, solution engineering, services, product specialists, and customer success teams to support opportunities and deliver strong customer outcomes.
* Continuous Learning: Stay up to date on Salesforce product capabilities and broader MarTech trends, including customer data platforms, personalization, automation, and digital engagement.


**Qualifications**
**Experience:**
* 3+ years of experience in a similar role such as Solution Engineering, Digital Marketing, or technical consulting or development
* Language Skills: Fluency in both Swedish and English is required
* MarTech Knowledge: Good understanding of the MarTech ecosystem and how platforms for campaign management, customer data, segmentation, personalization, and activation work together.


**Technical Skills**
* Good understanding of modern MarTech ecosystems and how data, activation, personalization, analytics, content, and integrations work together to enable customer engagement at scale. Experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP) concepts and adjacent marketing technologies is valued, but not required.
* Familiarity with topics such as data federation, composable architecture, CDP, flexible data models, identity resolution, clean rooms, cross-channel activation, dynamic content, and performance measurement is a plus. The candidate should be able to explain technical concepts in business terms and understand Salesforce’s role within a broader MarTech stack and brings curiosity for emerging AI-driven and agentic marketing capabilities.
* The right candidate with a strong technical and/or developer background is also welcome to apply, even if you have limited Marketing domain knowledge
* Presentation and Communication Skills. Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to persuasively present complex technical and data-centric concepts to a variety of audiences, from technical teams to C-level executives.
* Problem Solving skills. Structured and solution-oriented mindset with the ability to analyze requirements, identify options, and propose practical next steps.
* Collaboration: Comfortable working in cross-functional teams and contributing to shared success across sales and technical organizations.
* Industry Background: Experience in B2C or digitally mature industries such as Retail, Consumer Goods, Travel, Media, or Financial Services is beneficial.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Cloud Software Developer (Go)
description:
At Ubiquiti Inc., we create technology platforms for Businesses, Smart Homes, and Internet Service Providers, driven by our goal to connect everyone, everywhere. To date, Ubiquiti has shipped over 100 million devices worldwide, from ISP networking products to next generation of IT solutions. Our growth is made possible by the dedicated team of hundreds behind the scenes. From software developers and product managers to designers and strategists, Team UI is driven to achieve our common goal: Rethinking IT. At Ubiquiti, you’ll heighten your potential and broaden your horizons - all while shaping the future of connectivity.
   

  

**Join forces with us on our mission to build a better IT industry. We are currently looking for a highly skilled Cloud Software Developer (Go) to our team in Stockholm, Sweden.**
***Please note that applicants must live in Sweden and hold a valid work permit at the time of application to be considered for this role.***
**Responsibilities**
* Design and develop secure cloud-based services
* Integrate designs with larger software systems
* Co-work with cloud architects, backend, and frontend developers


**Requirements**
* 5+ years of experience with Golang is required
* Highly proficient in developing AWS cloud services
* Proficient with relational and document based databases
* Experience with developing RESTful and MQTT API
* Experience with Git/GitHub
* Experience with Linux and Docker environments
* Ability to work independently
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Strong sense of ownership of tasks and responsibilities
* Highly proficient in English (written and spoken)


**Nice To Have**
* Familiarity with Java development
* Basic knowledge of WebRTC and WebSockets
* A solid understanding of networking protocols and architecture
* Experience with SD-WAN and/or VPN technologies
* Familiarity with the Agile software development processes


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation
* Occupational pension, health insurance, private health insurance, life insurance and work-injury insurance, and wellness allowance (5000 SEK)
* Flexible work hours and a hybrid work model
* Access to all the latest Ubiquiti products for home use


***Please note that a background check will be conducted in the final stage of the recruitment process***

title: Quantexa Developer (f/m/x)
description:
Join Sii Sweden as a Quantexa Developer and contribute to the development of advanced data-driven solutions supporting financial crime prevention and transaction monitoring. You will design and maintain Quantexa and Spark-based applications that identify suspicious activities and potential money laundering patterns within large-scale financial data environments.
 



 This is a hands-on role combining data engineering, Quantexa development, and system stability responsibilities, offering the opportunity to work on critical systems that enhance transparency and trust in financial operations.
 



  





**Your tasks** 



* Drive release management and deployment activities
* Design, build, and maintain Quantexa and data applications using the Spark Framework
* Contribute to agile development processes and continuous improvement
* Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams to deliver stable and scalable solutions
* Provide production support, managing escalations and ensuring system stability



  





**Requirements** 



* Quantexa Certification
* Proven experience implementing Quantexa cross-border transaction monitoring use cases for AML/financial crime prevention
* Strong programming skills in Scala
* Solid experience with Apache Spark and Hadoop ecosystem, as well as Unix shell scripting, SQL, and version control tools (GIT)
* Good understanding of ETL processes and data warehousing concepts

title: Freelance - Senior Game Developer - Hole.io (8-month contract)
description:
**About Voodoo**
 Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.
   

  

 This position is fully remote within CET ±3h.
   

  

 Team
   

  

 Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the world's largest and most successful hybrid publisher.
   

  

 Voodoo is creating a talented team with a big mission: find the next best way to entertain the world by taking our best hits to a new level.
   

  

 You will be joining one of our Live Studios, working on
 **Hole.io** 
**.**
 Role
   

  

 We are looking for a highly technical Senior Game Developer to help the team maintain, scale, and optimize our hit games. Rather than focusing purely on gameplay design, you will take a rigorous engineering approach to solving complex technical challenges, ensuring our games run flawlessly on a vast array of mobile devices.
   

  

* Architect and write highly robust, scalable code to be enjoyed by millions of players worldwide
* Consistently implement strict performance optimizations to guarantee smooth frame rates and low memory footprints
* Proactively identify and eliminate technical debt, ensuring the long-term health, stability, and maintainability of the codebase
* Drive technical architecture decisions and core system refactoring within the game client
* Develop custom tools and workflows to support the development pipeline and improve code efficiency


 With this role, you will have a strong impact on the company by contributing daily to core technical decisions with a senior, multidisciplinary team of passionate and talented people. Oversee the game's technical implementation, debug complex systemic issues, and revise the codebase in response to rigorous profiling data. Thanks to your engineering expertise and teamwork, let’s entertain millions of people with flawlessly running hit games.
   

  

 Profile
   

  

* A strong engineering, analytical, and problem-solving mindset
* Advanced Unity knowledge (7y+) including deep scripting in C#, core system architecture, and memory profiling
* Requirement: Highly skilled in identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing general performance optimizations, with a strict focus on memory management, frame rate stability, CPU profiling, and reducing load times on mobile devices
* Strong understanding of software engineering principles and comfortably using Design Patterns
* Experience in complex systems architecture, data structures, and custom tools development
* Plus: Experience with advanced Physics implementations and rendering optimizations (e.g., custom shaders, draw call reduction, batching, GPU profiling)
* Speak and write English
* Track record with successful, high-scale mobile games
* Professional game development experience


**Benefits**
* Best-in-class compensation
* Other benefits according to the country you reside

title: ServiceNow HR Developer/ Implementation Consultant
description:
We are rapidly expanding our
 **ServiceNow Business Group in the Nordics** 
 and seeking visionary
 **ServiceNow HR Developer/ Implementation Consultant** 
 to help our clients transform their businesses, drive innovation, and achieve measurable outcomes.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
- Design and Implement HR Solutions: Configure and implement ServiceNow HR Service Delivery (HRSD) modules, including Case and Knowledge Management, Employee Center, and Lifecycle Events.

- Client Engagement: Collaborate with HR stakeholders to understand business needs and translate them into scalable ServiceNow solutions.

- Integration: Connect ServiceNow HR workflows with other enterprise systems (e.g., payroll, identity management).

- Platform Management: Ensure stability, performance, and compliance of the ServiceNow HRSD environment.

- Support and Optimization: Provide ongoing support, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve HR processes.

- Documentation: Maintain clear and comprehensive documentation for all configurations and customizations.

- Stay Current: Keep up to date with ServiceNow HRSD capabilities, certifications, and best practices.

- Mentorship: Share knowledge and guide junior team members.

**Preferred Qualifications**
- 3+ years of experience with ServiceNow, including HRSD implementation projects.

- Strong understanding of HR workflows, employee lifecycle processes, and ServiceNow HR modules.

- Hands-on experience with Flow Designer, Integration Hub, and scripting.

- Familiarity with Agile, Scrum, or SAFe methodologies.

- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

- Relevant ServiceNow certifications (HRSD Implementation Specialist preferred).

- University degree in Computer Science, HR Technology, or equivalent.

- Fluency in Swedish (spoken and written).

**What We Offer**
- Access to free ServiceNow training through our exclusive agreement with ServiceNow.

- Opportunities to become a Certified Technical Architect (CTA)

- Work on large-scale, complex HR transformations for leading Global enterprises.

- Be at the forefront of innovation, leveraging AI and advanced ServiceNow capabilities.

- Join the largest global network of ServiceNow experts, offering unparalleled collaboration and career growth.

title: Fullstack developer
description:
Har du några års erfarenhet som utvecklare och är intresserad av nya utvecklingsmöjligheter? Om du vill ha möjlighet att arbeta med både stora och små kunder i moderna utvecklingsprojekt där AI och Cloud är centralt ser vi gärna att du tar chansen och ansöker till oss på Cygni, part of Accenture. Vi letar nu efter nya kompetenta, härliga kollegor till oss både i Stockholm och Göteborg.
   

  

**Vilka är vi?**
 Cygni har funnits sedan 2006 och är sedan 2022 en del av Accenture, en global ledare inom tech och digital transformation. Cygni, part of Accenture är en grupp av härliga personer med hög teknisk kunskap som brinner för systemutveckling i alla dess former. Vi vill påverka, förbättra och skapa värde för våra kunder. Vi älskar teknik och att dela kunskap med varandra, självklart är det också viktigt att ha roligt på vägen. I dag finns Cygni, part of Accenture i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Östersund, Köpenhamn och Helsingfors. Alla våra kontor ligger central med närhet till kommunikation och restauranger.
   

  

 För dig som konsult finns det stora möjligheter, styrt av vad du brinner för och hur du vill utvecklas. Hos oss blir du en del av en unik kombination av kultur, trygghet och möjligheter.
   

  

**Rollbeskrivning**
 Som fullstackutvecklare hos Cygni, del av Accenture är du navet i våra kunduppdrag, ofta tillsammans med kollegor från Accenture. Kunduppdragen varierar och beror på vad som passar dig och din utvecklingsplan bäst. Du kan både vara en del av ett helt åtagande eller en del av ett mindre projekt hos kunden. Ofta arbetar du över hela stacken, från frontend och användbarhet till backend, integrationer och datalager. Möjlighet till att nischa sig inom specifika områden finns självklart också.
   

  

 Utvecklingen sker ofta i molnbaserade miljöer som AWS, Azure eller Google Cloud, serverless eller via containers i Kubernetes. Våra kunduppdrag omfattas till stor del av AI, har du erfarenhet eller intresse i att utvecklas inom detta är möjligheterna stora.
   

  

 Vanliga tekniker och koncept i våra uppdrag:
   

  

 C#, .Net, Java, Python, React, Kotlin, Typescript, C#, Node, Go, Vue, Angular, Flutter, Docker, AWS, Azure, GCP, CI/CD, microservices, microfrontends och mycket mer.
   

  

 Många av våra uppdrag erbjuder hybrid- eller helt remote-arbete. Vi uppskattar också om man då och då sitter på våra kontor för att bidra med kunskapsdelning och gemenskap. Vissa av oss är inne varje dag. Detta är upp till vad som passar dig bäst men roligast tror vi att vi har vi tillsammans.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du:
   

  

  

- Har några års erfarenhet av fullstackutveckling.

- Brinner för smarta tekniska lösningar och hållbar systemdesign.

- Gillar att dela kunskap och vara en relationsskapande konsult.

- Är nyfiken på både nya tekniker och nya sätt att lösa problem.

 Din erfarenhet blir viktig i att bygga skalbara, säkra och robusta system som skapar verkligt värde för våra kunder.

title: Fullstack utvecklare .Net med backendfokus till Svea Bank
description:
Är du en Backend-utvecklare som drivs av komplexa tekniska utmaningar och vill skapa hållbara lösningar? Vi söker dig som vill använda din kunskap hos oss på Svea Bank där du får möjlighet att arbeta med engagerade kollegor och vara med och skapa smarta, hållbara och säkra lösningar. Är du trygg i dina kunskaper, stöttande och har ett affärstänk som sträcker sig bortom programmering? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker en engagerad Backend utvecklare inom .NET / C#. med Frontend-erfarenhet. På Svea Bank fokuserar vi på att forma stabila och autonoma team där alla bidrar med idéer och tankar för att skapa en dynamisk och kreativ utvecklingsmiljö. Du blir en del vårt utvecklingsteam inom affärsområdet Administrativa och Finansiella tjänster (AFT) – Sveas största och mest lönsamma område. Här skapas moderna, säkra och användarvänliga lösningar för företagstjänster som t.ex. företagskredit – en tjänst där företagare snabbt och smidigt kan stärka sin likviditet med onboarding via mobilt BankID.
   

  

 Som Backend-utvecklare kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att designa och utveckla moderna tjänster som är viktiga byggstenar i vårt finansiella ekosystem. Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team med bred kompetens där ni tillsammans löser tekniskt utmanande uppgifter. Rollen kräver engagemang, nyfikenhet och förmåga att ta egna initiativ – och självklart finns teamet där för att stötta och bolla idéer.
   

  

*Tech stack:*
* NET Core/Framework, C#, F#, Dotnet 8,
* Event driven architecture
* Angular, ASP.NET MVC, Web API, SQL, Azure/Git, TFS.


 Som backend utvecklare i teamet arbetar du med både nyutveckling och förvaltning av dessa system i .NET / C#, där du bygger integrationer och programmerar API:er för effektiva dataflöden.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Du är en driven, kreativ och nyfiken person med en genuin passion för mjukvaruutveckling. Precis som vi, älskar du att lära dig, hålla dig uppdaterad om de senaste tekniktrenderna och skriva ren, högkvalitativ kod. Du är bekväm med att dela dina tankar, lyfta problem tidigt och bidra till genomtänkta lösningar. Du trivs i en teammiljö och har erfarenhet av att arbeta i en agil miljö. Du har arbetat med utveckling ett tag och är självgående och trygg i dina kunskaper, samt vill och kan dela med dig av dessa till ditt team. Du är en hjälpsam lagspelare som är ansvarstagande för din egen kod, men även för kvaliteten på arbetet teamet som helhet levererar. Du är lösningsfokuserad och kommunikativ, uppskattar kunskapsdelning och har tålamod att hjälpa dina kollegor vid behov.
   

  

**Erfarenhet & kvalifikationer:**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att arbeta som .NET-utvecklare
* Minst kandidatexamen inom datavetenskap eller mjukvaruteknik
* God kunskap och erfarenhet av C# och .NET Core/Framework
* God kunskap och erfarenhet av CI/CD pipelines och REST API:er
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


 Har du erfarenhet från finansiell bransch, är detta meriterande.
   

  

***Om Svea***
*Svea är en finansiell koncern med över 2000 anställda och verksamhet i flertalet europeiska länder. Med mer än 40 års erfarenhet är vi stolta över att erbjuda innovativa och hållbara finansiella lösningar till våra kunder. Svea präglas av en familjär företagskultur där varje medarbetare bidrar med sin unika kompetens och engagemang. Vår företagskultur betonar gemenskap, handlingskraft, och balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Välkommen att följa med oss på vår spännande resa!*
**Ansökan**
 Vi har tyvärr inte möjlighet att ta emot ansökningar via mail. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande och vi önskar att tillsätta tjänsten så snart som möjligt så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

 Har du frågor kring tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att höra av dig till rekryterare Mira Leppänen på mira.leppanen@svea.com.

title: Fullstack utvecklare .Net med backendfokus till Svea Bank
description:
Är du en Backend-utvecklare som drivs av komplexa tekniska utmaningar och vill skapa hållbara lösningar? Vi söker dig som vill använda din kunskap hos oss på Svea Bank där du får möjlighet att arbeta med engagerade kollegor och vara med och skapa smarta, hållbara och säkra lösningar. Är du trygg i dina kunskaper, stöttande och har ett affärstänk som sträcker sig bortom programmering? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker en engagerad Backend utvecklare inom .NET / C#. med Frontend-erfarenhet. På Svea Bank fokuserar vi på att forma stabila och autonoma team där alla bidrar med idéer och tankar för att skapa en dynamisk och kreativ utvecklingsmiljö. Du blir en del vårt utvecklingsteam inom affärsområdet Administrativa och Finansiella tjänster (AFT) – Sveas största och mest lönsamma område. Här skapas moderna, säkra och användarvänliga lösningar för företagstjänster som t.ex. företagskredit – en tjänst där företagare snabbt och smidigt kan stärka sin likviditet med onboarding via mobilt BankID.
   

  

 Som Backend-utvecklare kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att designa och utveckla moderna tjänster som är viktiga byggstenar i vårt finansiella ekosystem. Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team med bred kompetens där ni tillsammans löser tekniskt utmanande uppgifter. Rollen kräver engagemang, nyfikenhet och förmåga att ta egna initiativ – och självklart finns teamet där för att stötta och bolla idéer.
   

  

**Tech Stack**
* NET Core/Framework, C#, F#, Dotnet 8,
* Event driven architecture
* Angular, ASP.NET MVC, Web API, SQL, Azure/Git, TFS.


 Som backend utvecklare i teamet arbetar du med både nyutveckling och förvaltning av dessa system i .NET / C#, där du bygger integrationer och programmerar API:er för effektiva dataflöden.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Du är en driven, kreativ och nyfiken person med en genuin passion för mjukvaruutveckling. Precis som vi, älskar du att lära dig, hålla dig uppdaterad om de senaste tekniktrenderna och skriva ren, högkvalitativ kod. Du är bekväm med att dela dina tankar, lyfta problem tidigt och bidra till genomtänkta lösningar. Du trivs i en teammiljö och har erfarenhet av att arbeta i en agil miljö. Du har arbetat med utveckling ett tag och är självgående och trygg i dina kunskaper, samt vill och kan dela med dig av dessa till ditt team. Du är en hjälpsam lagspelare som är ansvarstagande för din egen kod, men även för kvaliteten på arbetet teamet som helhet levererar. Du är lösningsfokuserad och kommunikativ, uppskattar kunskapsdelning och har tålamod att hjälpa dina kollegor vid behov.
   

  

**Erfarenhet & Kvalifikationer**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att arbeta som .NET-utvecklare
* Minst kandidatexamen inom datavetenskap eller mjukvaruteknik
* God kunskap och erfarenhet av C# och .NET Core/Framework
* God kunskap och erfarenhet av CI/CD pipelines och REST API:er
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


 Har du erfarenhet från finansiell bransch, är detta meriterande.
   

  

***Om Svea***
*Svea är en finansiell koncern med över 2000 anställda och verksamhet i flertalet europeiska länder. Med mer än 40 års erfarenhet är vi stolta över att erbjuda innovativa och hållbara finansiella lösningar till våra kunder. Svea präglas av en familjär företagskultur där varje medarbetare bidrar med sin unika kompetens och engagemang. Vår företagskultur betonar gemenskap, handlingskraft, och balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Välkommen att följa med oss på vår spännande resa!*
**Ansökan**
 Vi har tyvärr inte möjlighet att ta emot ansökningar via mail. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande och vi önskar att tillsätta tjänsten så snart som möjligt så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

 Har du frågor kring tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att höra av dig till rekryterare Mira Leppänen på mira.leppanen@svea.com.

title: Senior .NET utvecklare
description:
**Om rollen**
 Som Senior .NET-utvecklare blir du en nyckelperson i Skandias AML-team (Anti-Money Laundering), där ni utvecklar systemstöd för att förebygga penningtvätt och finansiering av terrorism – ett affärskritiskt uppdrag med tydlig samhällsnytta.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära både verksamhet och teknik och är delaktig i att designa, utveckla och vidareutveckla stabila och säkra lösningar. Rollen innebär att bidra i design-, arkitektur- och kravdiskussioner samt vara med och fatta tekniska vägval tillsammans med teamet.
   

  

 Arbetet fokuserar på backendutveckling i .NET/C# och eventdriven arkitektur i en säkerhetskänslig miljö med stora datamängder och höga krav på tillförlitlighet.
   

  

 Du utvecklar och optimerar integrationer mot andra system, samarbetar nära teamet genom exempelvis par- och mobbprogrammering och bidrar till kontinuerlig förbättring av kod, arbetssätt och lösningar.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi söker dig som trivs i en utvecklarroll där kvalitet, säkerhet och stabila lösningar är avgörande. Du är van att arbeta i affärskritiska systemmiljöer och har erfarenhet av att ta ansvar för tekniska lösningar genom hela utvecklingsprocessen – från design och implementation till vidareutveckling och förbättring.
   

  

 Du arbetar strukturerat, har ett analytiskt förhållningssätt och trivs med att samarbeta nära andra utvecklare. Samtidigt delar du gärna med dig av din kunskap och bidrar till att utveckla både teamets arbetssätt och tekniska lösningar.
   

  

 Du har även ett intresse för att ligga i framkant inom AI-stödd systemutveckling, till exempel genom verktyg som GitHub Copilot.
   

  

**Du har erfarenhet av**
* Systemutveckling i C# / .NET
* Backendutveckling och integrationer
* Eventdriven arkitektur eller meddelandebaserade lösningar
* ASP.NET / MVC och REST-baserade API:er
* Databashantering med MS SQL, samt ORM-verktyg som EF Core eller Dapper
* Versionshantering och CI/CD-flöden
* Kommunikation på svenska, i tal och skrift


**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi arbetar med löpande urval, så skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag.
   

  

 Rekryteringsprocessen innehåller intervjuer, tester, bakgrundskontroll samt digital referenstagning för att säkerställa en rättvis och objektiv bedömning. Du kan läsa mer om vår process här.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Stephan Mannerfelt på stephan.mannerfelt@skandia.se
   

  

 Om du har frågor om rekryteringsprocessen, vänligen kontakta Talent Acquisition Partner, Nina Fazeli på nina.fazeli@skandia.se
   

  

 Vi återkopplar till alla som söker, oavsett om du går vidare i processen eller inte.
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**
**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Back End Developer
description:
Vill du vara med och utveckla en produkt som faktiskt gör skillnad i människors vardag? Hos oss på
 **Frenda** 
 får du chansen att vara med i ett engagerat team som byggt en
 **molnbaserad tandvårdsplattform** 
 som idag används på
 **1000+ kliniker av 8000+ aktiva användare** 
 i Sverige.
 



  





 Vi utvecklar affärskritiska system för en reglerad och komplex miljö där stabilitet, prestanda och användarupplevelse är avgörande. Nu söker vi fullstackutvecklare som vill ta tekniskt ägarskap och vara med och vidareutveckla en plattform i stor skala.
 



  





**Om rollen - vad du kommer att göra** 




 Som Backendutvecklare hos oss arbetar du med kärnan i vår produkt. Du utvecklar och förbättrar affärslogik, datamodeller och API:er som varje dag används av tandvårdspersonal runt om i landet.
 



  





 Du kommer att:
 


* Ansvara för vår backend-arkitektur och långsiktiga tekniska riktning i en .NET-baserad miljö
* Designa robusta datamodeller och affärslogik för komplexa vårdflöden
* Säkerställa hög prestanda, dataintegritet och säkerhet i våra systemlösningar
* Arbeta med skalbarhet och stabilitet för en plattform som används dagligen på 1000+ kliniker
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt med andra team och utvecklare



  





 Vi levererar som ett team och arbetar med korta beslutsvägar. Här finns utrymme att driva förbättringar och påverka hur vi bygger produkten framåt.
 



  





**Din profil - det här ser vi gärna att du har** 




 Vi vill att du är nyfiken, tar ansvar och tycker om att arbeta i team. Det viktiga för oss är
 **viljan att lära och växa tillsammans** 
 så vi gör en tydlig skillnad mellan vad som är
 *grundläggande* 
 och vad som är
 *meriterande* 
 :
 



  





**Grundläggande** 



* Flerårig erfarenhet av backendutveckling i C# och .NET
* God kompetens inom utveckling av RESTful API:er och relationsdatabaser (SQL)
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med affärslogik och datamodellering
* Kunskap inom prestanda- och databasoptimering
* Erfarenhet av Git och agila arbetsmetoder
* Trivs med samarbete och att diskutera tekniska lösningar i team



**Meriterande (men inte krav)** 



* Erfarenhet av molntjänster och CI/CD-pipelines
* Erfarenhet av containerteknik eller distribuerade system
* Tidigare erfarenhet av att arbeta i ett produktbolag



  





 Vi är öppna för
 **både dig som är en trygg mid-level utvecklare och dig som vill ta, eller redan har, ett mer seniort ansvar** 
 .
 



  





**Varför Frenda?** 




 Vi erbjuder:
 



 ✅ En chans att påverka verkliga användare och patienters vardag
 



 ✅ Möjlighet att arbeta med affärskritiska system i stor skala
 



 ✅ Teknisk frihet och ansvar
 



 ✅ Flexibla arbetstider och hybridarbete
 



 ✅ Kollektivavtal samt konkurrenskraftiga förmåner och pensionslösningar
 



  





**Så går rekryteringen till** 




 Vi jobbar med en snabb och transparent process:
 


1. Kort introduktionssamtal
2. Intervju med Engineering Manager
3. Teknisk intervju + kodexempel eller hemuppgift
4. Referenser & bakgrundskontroll
5. Erbjudande



  





**Ansök nu!** 




 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig och vad du kan tillföra teamet! Skicka din ansökan redan idag.

title: Backend-utvecklare till snabbväxande fintech - Kaching (Stockholm)
description:
Golang. Python. Fintech som växer snabbt. Om de orden väckte något, så är det just du som ska fortsätta läsa.
 



  





**Vad är Kaching?** 




 Enkelt förklarat: cashback som faktiskt fungerar. Pengarna hamnar direkt på kortet, inte i en app full av poäng som ingen orkar lösa in. Vi är ett svenskt fintechbolag mitt i en internationell expansion, med marknader i Europa och Latinamerika på kartan.
 



 Teamet är litet. Ambitionen stor.
 



  





**Din vardag på Kaching** 




 Du sitter nära CTO och blir en nyckelspelare i tech-teamet. Du designar API:er, integrerar externa datakällor, håller koll på prestanda och är med i de tekniska beslut som faktiskt formar produkten.
 



 Ingen ticketfabrik. Ingen långsam release-cykel. Kod du skriver på måndag kan vara i produktion på fredag.
 



  





**Tech stack i korthet** 



* Golang (ca 80%)
* Python (ca 20%)
* AWS (ECS + Lambda)
* Microservices-arkitektur



  





**Du är troligtvis rätt person om du** 



* Har ca 2-4+ år av backendutveckling bakom dig och känner dig stark i Golang
* Har byggt och underhållit API:er (REST / GraphQL)
* Är bekväm med molnmiljöer (AWS / GCP / Azure)
* Tänker på säkerhet och skalbarhet som en självklarhet, inte som en eftertanke
* Trivs med att ta ansvar för helheten, inte bara din del av koden



  





**Bonuspoäng för** 



* Erfarenhet från payments, fintech eller liknande domäner
* Postgres, Docker, eller en känsla för hur frontend och backend hänger ihop
* Att du tidigare jobbat i en miljö där saker rör sig fort och processer byggs medan man springer



  





**Vad du får** 



* Heltidstjänst
* Konkurrenskraftig lön
* Tidig position i ett bolag på väg uppåt
* Tekniskt mandat. Dina åsikter räknas och syns i produkten
* Kollegor som är bra på det de gör och inte slösar din tid



  





**Nästa steg** 




 Vi på Eira hjälper Kaching att hitta rätt person för den här rollen. Processen ser ut såhär:
 


1. Ansök och ladda upp ditt CV. Tar 30 sekunder.
2. Kort digitalt incheckningssamtal med Eira. Cirka 5-10 minuter.
3. Finns det en matchning presenterar vi dig för kunden.
