title: Test Automation Engineer
description:
**About Consilium Safety Group**


At Consilium Safety Group, we don’t just build technology—we create solutions that protect people, assets, and the planet. As a global leader in fire and gas safety, we serve critical industries such as marine, energy, rolling stock, and infrastructure.


With more than 100 years of expertise, we combine deep industry knowledge with cutting-edge innovation to shape the future of Safety Tech. Headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, with over 55 offices worldwide, we are a fast-evolving global organization backed by Antin Infrastructure Partners. With strong financial support and a clear strategic vision, we are continuing an ambitious journey of growth and transformation—investing in innovation, operational excellence, and talent.


This is an exciting time to join us.

**Your Role**


As a Test Automation Engineer, you will play a central role in ensuring the quality and reliability of a complex, safety-critical system. This is a hands-on position where you will take ownership of building a complete automated testing ecosystem, from defining strategy and selecting tools to implementing frameworks and writing test code.


You will work across the full stack, covering frontend, backend, and system-level validation. Your work will include automated UI testing, backend and API verification, and system-level testing supported by simulations and realistic environments. A key part of the role is shaping how testing is done, defining what to test, how to test it, and how to ensure quality end-to-end across the product.


You will collaborate closely with developers and system engineers to build testable, scalable solutions, while integrating continuous testing into CI/CD pipelines. Beyond implementation, you will also help identify gaps in test coverage, improve processes, and contribute to a strong quality culture within the team.

**What You Bring**


We believe you have solid experience working with test automation in production environments and are comfortable writing code as part of your daily work, whether in TypeScript, C#, Python, or a similar language. You have hands-on experience with modern frontend testing tools such as Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium, as well as experience testing backend services and APIs.


You understand how automated testing fits into CI/CD workflows and are familiar with tools such as GitHub Actions or similar platforms. Just as importantly, you have the ability to think strategically about testing in complex, distributed systems and enjoy taking ownership of quality from a holistic perspective.


Experience with safety-critical or industrial systems is a plus, as is familiarity with simulators, virtual devices, or hardware-in-the-loop testing. Knowledge of performance or load testing and a broader full-stack understanding will also be valuable in this role.

**Our Tech Stack**


You will be working in an environment that includes TypeScript and Vue.js on the frontend, and C#/.NET with ASP.NET on the backend. Communication is handled through technologies such as gRPC and OPC-UA, and testing is primarily done using Playwright alongside internal tools. Our development practices are built around CI/CD pipelines, automated workflows, and DevOps principles.

**Why Join Us?**


This is an opportunity to build the testing foundation for software that has a direct impact on safety. You will have the chance to take real ownership and shape how automated testing is approached across the team, influencing tools, frameworks, and overall architecture.


You will be part of a highly dedicated engineering team working on a mission-critical product, where quality truly matters. Together, we are building what we aim to be the world’s most trusted Safety Management System.

**Apply Now**


Does this sound like your next challenge?


Please apply as soon as possible, as we review applications on a continuous basis.


Consilium Safety Group is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion.


Ready to learn more about our journey? Click to hear from our CEO!


Philip Isell Lind af Hageby, Consilium, en mästare på turnarounds - Värdeskaparna | En podd om riskkapital av OPX Partners | Podcast on Spotify

title: System Development Specialist
description:
**Description**


**The opportunity**  

Do you have a background as a software engineer? Join us! We are now hiring a System Development Specialist to join our team in Västerås (Finnslätten), Sweden.  

  

The team is responsible for developing and maintaining Hitachi Energy’s Manufacturing Execution System (MES), as well as modernizing the tech stack with REST APIs, Blazor, improved access control and governance, and fully implemented CI/CD pipelines. As part of our team, you’ll contribute across infrastructure, deployment, testing, and full‑stack development, and play a key role in rebuilding a high‑impact system used daily across our manufacturing environment.

  

You’ll be part of a skilled, collaborative, and forward‑thinking team that owns and evolves one of the most important systems in Hitachi Energy’s manufacturing landscape. Here, your work directly impacts real operations, and you’ll have the freedom to influence architecture, introduce new technologies, and drive meaningful improvements. We offer strong development opportunities, a supportive culture, and the chance to contribute to products that keep factories running efficiently and safely.


Ready to help shape the future of our MES? Apply today and make a real impact.

 **How you’ll make an impact**

* Analyze business and technical requirements to design and implement software solutions
* Participate in the full software development lifecycle from design to deployment and maintenance
* Develop and maintain .NET applications (desktop and web) using C#
* Design, build, and document RESTful Web APIs
* Collaborate with team members and cross‑functional stakeholders, driving initiatives end‑to‑end
* Support operators, factory staff, and warehouse personnel using the MES
* Work with Git repositories and CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps
* Write and maintain unit tests and contribute to automation initiatives
* Participate in migrating the MES to a new generation tech stack, and bring ideas to shape its future evolution

 **Your background**

* Minimum 3 years of experience in software development with C# and .NET is required in this position
* Minimum 3 years of experience with hands‑on experience building REST Web APIs and working with modern HTML/CSS‑based front‑end frameworks is required
* Experience with Git and CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps preferred) is required
* Proficiency with Microsoft Visual Studio and SQL Server Management Studio is advantageous
* Solid understanding of relational database design, SQL schemas, querying, and performance optimization
* Experience developing and maintaining web applications (desktop application experience is a plus)
* Experience with service‑oriented architecture and basic DevOps or deployment automation (preferred)
* Interest in cyber and information security, including access control
* Experience with unit testing and contributing to automation initiatives

 **What we offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working time
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

 **More about us**


Are you ready for a new exciting challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today!

  

Recruiting Manager Raju T, raju.t@hitachienergy.com, will be happy to answer your questions regarding this position. Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Klas Koppari +46 107- 38 13 45. Unionen: Fredrik W Nordin +46 107-38 15 12. All other questions can be directed to Lead Recruiter, Christian Falevi

**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**

title: Security Engineer – Sentor (Part of Accenture Cybersecurity)
description:
Accenture is a globally recognized professional services company known as a Great Place To Work®, bringing together deep industry knowledge and specialized skills across consulting, technology, cybersecurity, operations, and digital transformation. As part of Accenture Cybersecurity, you will join a global network of experts dedicated to helping organizations protect their most critical assets. Our teams apply cuttingedge technology, strong security expertise, and continuous learning to address today’s most complex cyber threats, while maintaining a collaborative and inclusive culture where people grow and thrive.


As part of Accenture, Sentor covers the majority of cybersecurity services in Sweden — from offensive security such as penetration testing to defensive capabilities including SOC monitoring and managed security services. Joining our Stockholm office means becoming part of a hybrid, flexible, and forwardleaning work environment. You will work closely with passionate security professionals who are committed to improving the resilience of our clients across Sweden.  

  

You will be part of our **Managed Security Services (MSS)** organization, which includes both the SOC team and our Security Engineers. The team consists of around **1****7****skilled professionals** who work closely together, share knowledge continuously, and collaborate on solving practical cybersecurity challenges across varied industries. This is a tight-knit group where you will contribute, learn, and have a real impact on our clients’ security posture.  

  

As a Security Engineer in our MSS team, you will play a key role in strengthening the defensive capabilities of our clients. Your responsibilities include:

* Supporting SOC analysts in detection engineering, log onboarding, and incident investigations
* Ensuring high-quality monitoring, alerting, and configuration of security tools, for e.g. **Policy****-****based****work within the Microsoft XDR suite** in a SOC/MSS context involves designing, implementing, and tuning security policies that drive consistent detection, prevention, and response across endpoints, identities, email, and cloud environments
* Working collaboratively with the broader cybersecurity teams — both offensive and defensive within Accenture
* Participating in continuous improvement of detection capabilities, internal processes, and tooling within our team
* Contributing to knowledge sharing and maintaining a strong engineering culture within the team
* Supporting our clients as subject matter expert in projects regarding SIEM and XDR

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys hands-on security work, problem solving, and collaborating closely with colleagues to help protect clients from real-world threats.


  

**Basic Qualifications:**

* Minimum **5-7****years of experience** in cybersecurity, preferably in defensive operations – or equivalent experience in infrastructure DevOps
* Based in the **Stockholm area**
* Certifications related to security (e.g., CompTIA, GIAC, Microsoft Security) are a plus
* Strong hands-on experience with implementation and management of **SIEM platforms****or different XDR platforms**
* Experience in **Microsoft****XDR**
* Experience with **Microsoft Azure Sentinel****, Splunk****or ELK**as SIEM solutions for security monitoring
* Experience in regulatory framework alignment such as **NIS2****, NIST**
* Proficient in Python & PowerShell
* Fluency in **Swedish and English**
 **Bonus if you have:**

* Experience with **Threat Intelligence**
* Experience with **Incident Response**
* Experience with OT / IoT environments
 **What****We****Offer**

* A collaborative and knowledge sharing team culture
* Opportunities to work with diverse clients and security challenges
* Access to Accenture’s global cybersecurity network and training resources
* Hybrid and flexible working arrangements
* A workplace that encourages growth, skills development, and continuous learning

We evaluate candidates continuously.  

If you have questions about the role, please reach out to **karl.kego@accenture.com**.

title: Fullstack engineer
description:

* Proficient in web test tooling, preferably using Mocha, React, and WebdriverIO.

 09-04-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Cloud Engineer
description:
So, are you ready to redefine the financial industry? Does a serious technical challenge make your heart beat faster? Do you give energy to those who work with you, and are you looking for an energy-boosting work environment? Then Nordnet is the place for you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 Nordnet is rebuilding the bank on Google Cloud Platform. Not lift-and-shift. Not partial migration. A full architectural transformation.
   

  

 The Cloud Platform team builds and operates the mission-critical foundation that all product teams rely on: robust infrastructure, golden paths, Terraform modules, developer experience, reliability guardrails, and cloud best practices.
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers with strong development backgrounds (Java or Golang preferred) who have transitioned into cloud engineering and want to work at the platform layer, building scalable infrastructure that enables hundreds of engineers to move fast, safely.
   

  

 This role combines software engineering discipline with infrastructure depth. If you enjoy turning complexity into reusable patterns and building platforms that scale people, this job is for you.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
 In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with product and platform teams to:
   

  

* Design and evolve Nordnet’s cloud platform on GCP.
* Develop and maintain Terraform modules and opinionated “golden paths.”
* Create secure and scalable patterns for CloudSQL, networking, IAM, Kubernetes, observability, and more.
* Improve the developer experience around infrastructure provisioning.
* Strengthen reliability, automation, and operational maturity.
* Contribute to standards and support teams in adopting them.


 You won’t be working in isolation; much of the work involves discussion, refinement, and shared ownership.
   

  

**As a Cloud Engineer At Nordnet, You**
* Are an experienced engineer (typically 5+ years in software development).
* Have built production systems in Java or Golang.
* Have experience working with cloud infrastructure in one of the major providers (GCP, AWS, or Azure).
* Understand distributed systems and how they behave under failure.
* Care about automation, CI/CD, and infrastructure as code.
* Communicate clearly and enjoy working with others to find pragmatic solutions.


*You don’t need to tick every box. If you have a passion for building cloud platforms, we encourage you to apply!*
**Experience That Will Help You Succeed**
* Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools.
* Kubernetes in production.
* IAM and cloud security design.
* Networking in cloud environments.
* Observability (metrics, logging, alerting).
* CI/CD pipelines.
* Designing highly available systems.


**What We Offer**
* A collaborative environment where learning is continuous.
* Meaningful technical challenges to tackle together with experienced colleagues.
* Opportunities to grow as an engineer and/or leader.
* Competitive salary and compensation.


 As a Nordnetter, you are a pragmatic collaborator who thrives on open feedback and values simple, maintainable solutions. You enjoy working closely with internal customers and always prioritize systemic thinking over isolated tasks to ensure a holistic impact.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Nordnet was founded to redefine the financial world by giving power back to the customers. Our journey has just begun, and our vision is simple: to make our customers the best investors they can be.
   

  

 With 900 colleagues across the Nordics, we value open communication, creativity, and a flat organization where every effort counts. Our culture is built on passion, simplicity, and transparency. Here, anyone can talk to anyone, and we take pride in a warm atmosphere where great technology is pivotal to our success.
   

  

**Visit us:** 
 nordnetab.com | nordnet.se | nordnet.no | nordnet.dk | nordnet.fi
   

  

**Applications & Questions**
 If you have any questions, please contact Senior Talent Acquisition Partner Sophie Esphagen at sophie.esphagen@nordnet.se
   

  

 Please note that Nordnet conducts credit and background checks on the final candidate as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**

title: DevOps Engineer – Infrastruktur & Automatisering
description:
Vill du vara med och utveckla och förvalta robusta och säkra infrastrukturplattformar i komplexa miljöer? Nu söker vi en DevOps Engineer som vill arbeta med automatisering, systemintegration och modern infrastruktur i ett team där samarbete och tekniskt djup står i fokus.
 



  





 Detta uppdrag i Stockholm omfattas av säkerhetsskydd och kräver att du blir godkänd enligt gällande regelverk.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Om uppdraget** 




 Du blir en del av ett DevOps-team som ansvarar för både nya och befintliga infrastrukturplattformar. Rollen har ett tydligt fokus på Infrastructure as Code och automatisering, där du tillsammans med dina kollegor bygger, vidareutvecklar och förvaltar Windows- och Linuxbaserade tjänster.
 



  





 Eftersom många av systemen har höga säkerhetskrav är IT-säkerhet en naturlig och integrerad del av det dagliga arbetet.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 I rollen arbetar du bland annat med att:
 


* Sätta upp nya miljöer genom automatisering
* Skapa och underhålla systemintegrationer via automatiserade lösningar
* Utveckla och realisera nya tekniska förmågor i nära samarbete med teamet
* Förvalta och vidareutveckla IT-infrastruktur med hjälp av Infrastructure as Code
* Felsöka och hantera tekniska incidenter
* Dokumentera lösningar och dela kunskap inom teamet



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Vi söker dig som är driven, positiv och trygg i din tekniska kompetens. Du trivs med att ta eget ansvar, förbättra arbetssätt och bidra till både teamets och plattformarnas utveckling. Du arbetar självständigt när det krävs, men värdesätter samarbete och kunskapsdelning högt.
 



  





 Har du erfarenhet av att leda mindre tekniska initiativ eller agera tekniskt bollplank för kollegor ser vi det som ett plus.
 



  





 Dokumentation är en viktig del av rollen, vilket innebär att du behöver behärska både svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift.
 



  





**Vi ser gärna att du har:** 



* Erfarenhet som DevOps Engineer eller liknande roll
* God kompetens inom Windows och/eller Linux
* Vana av att arbeta med programmering och scripting, exempelvis Python och PowerShell
* Erfarenhet av systemintegration och arbete i komplexa miljöer
* Goda kunskaper inom infrastruktur och nätverk
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code, till exempel med Ansible



  





 Låter det här som nästa steg för dig? Hör av dig så berättar vi mer.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

description:

title: Backend Engineer
description:
*We're at a pivotal moment for both Tibber and the planet. When joining Tibber, you won’t just help scale a forward-thinking tech company – you’ll contribute to a real shift in how people consume electricity. With millions of smart devices connected to the Tibber platform (like electric vehicles and smart thermostats), we have one of the most unique energy trading portfolios on the market.*
*We’re looking for a Backend Engineer to join us in making the energy transition happen – maybe that’s you?*
**Job Mission 🚀**
 As a Backend Engineer, you’ll join our Energy Deal area (Tibber’s Energy Retail Platform) owning the full energy subscription lifecycle, from sign-up to termination, including market integrations, consumption/volume handling, invoicing, payments, and collections. You’ll shape clear system boundaries, build great APIs and tooling, and help ensure a scalable, reliable platform across markets
   

  

**What You'll Do ✅**
* Build, evolve, and operate backend services within a microservices ecosystem (across billing, payments, volume, market communication, and internal tooling)
* Take operational ownership: monitoring, incident response, on-call readiness, and continuous reliability improvements (DevOps)
* Drive measurable improvements in within the area, for example improve payment rate
* Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and market specialists to turn complex requirements into solutions
* Reduce complexity by clarifying boundaries, defining interfaces, and improving service-to-service contracts
* Champion a platform mindset by treating internal APIs and tools as products used by other teams
* Contribute to technical discussions, architecture work, and longer-term initiatives across all of our markets


**What We're Looking For⚡**
 Someone who enjoys taking ownership of complex systems and shipping improvements that matter. You thrive in an environment where you’re trusted with high accountability and real impact. We also believe that you:
   

  

* Have senior backend experience building and operating distributed systems in production environments
* Bring strong engineering practices (testing, observability, CI/CD) and care about running what you build
* Are comfortable in high-transaction domains where correctness, traceability, and reliability are non-negotiable
* Collaborate with a team-first mindset: invite input early, surface blockers fast, and give/receive feedback in a constructive way
* Located in Stockholm or Førde (or open to relocating) and able to work from our office 2-3 days/week
* Fluent in English, with excellent written and verbal communication skills


*Bonus points if: experience within the energy market, billing/payments or financial systems, internal platforms/dev tooling, or parts of our stack (.NET, Kafka, Kubernetes, AWS, Postgres)*
**💆🏻‍♀️💆🏽‍♂️The Tibber Mindset**
 Tibber is not your typical energy supplier. Our tech helps hundreds of thousands of households lower and shift their energy consumption to more sustainable and affordable hours. We’re here to accelerate the energy transition – not in theory, but in everyday life.
   

  

 Being on a mission to change an industry, fundamentally also means being prepared for the unexpected. We do what others say can’t be done, try and fail together but never lose sight of our users. We work passionately with sustainability and a circular approach, both with our own products and in the entire ecosystem that is affected by everything we do.
   

  

 Starting out with two passionate founders in 2016, we're now 300+ people working for Tibber in our offices in Stockholm, Førde, Berlin, Amsterdam, and Oslo. We will continue to grow within our markets, and we are thrilled to be backed by investors like Balderton Capital, Eight Roads Ventures, Founders Fund, Summa, and Schibsted.
   

  

*Diversity of thought fuels better products, so we welcome applicants of every background, identity and lived experience. Ready to be part of powering the energy transition?* 
***Apply below!***

title: Technical Account Manger - AWS
description:
As a Technical Account Manager (TAM) for AWS at Ingram Micro, you will act as a trusted advisor to our AWS reseller partners across the Nordics. Your role is to provide technical guidance, solution alignment, and architectural support that drives partner success and accelerates AWS adoption. You will work closely with sales, vendor management, and cloud architects to ensure partners are technically equipped and strategically supported to grow their AWS practice.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Act as the primary technical point of contact for AWS partners — advising on architecture, best practices, and solution design.
* Support onboarding of new partners from a technical perspective, ensuring smooth integration with Ingram Micro’s AWS platform and services.
* Deliver technical enablement sessions, solution workshops, and pre-sales guidance to partner technical teams.
* Map partner capabilities and maturity to AWS program requirements, helping them progress in the AWS partner journey.
* Drive adoption of AWS tools, programs, and services — including Well-Architected Reviews, credits, and POCs.
* Work closely with cloud architects to scope opportunities and design scalable solutions based on partner and customer needs.
* Maintain accurate technical insights and partner progress in CRM and internal planning tools.
* Collaborate with AWS vendor management and GTM teams to identify opportunities and co-develop technical value propositions.
* Support internal training and serve as technical lead on key AWS-focused initiatives and campaigns.


**Skills & Requirements:**
* 3+ years of experience in cloud, pre-sales, or technical customer-facing roles — preferably with AWS or other hyperscaler platforms.
* Solid understanding of AWS core services (compute, storage, networking, security, DevOps).
* Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Fluent in English; Swedish or another Nordic language is a plus.
* AWS certifications (e.g., Cloud Practitioner, Solutions Architect Associate) are highly desirable.
* Experience with partner ecosystems, value-based selling, and solution design.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
   

  

 Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a
 **Senior backend engineer to join our Stockholm office** 
 with strong,
 **hands‑on expertise in modern Java,** 
 experienced in building and maintaining distributed systems and microservices. Brings solid proficiency in CI/CD and
 **Azure DevOps** 
 (or comparable platforms), along with practical knowledge of cloud environments, containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, automated testing practices, and operating services reliably in production.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Focus on backend development, with responsibility for services, databases, and system integrations.
* Develop, improve, and maintain services with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and long-term maintainability.
* Select and use technologies based on problem-solving value, not trendiness.
* Ensure that deliveries are on time and secure, always balancing speed with quality.
* Collaborate closely with teammates and stakeholders, enabling fast and sustainable delivery.
* Over time, take a leading role in driving improvements in both technology and ways of working.


**Our Tech Stack (key areas for this role)**
* Java (primary language: deep expertise required)
* Spring Boot
* REST, Microservices, Databases
* Azure (cloud environment), Docker, Kubernetes


**About You**
* Highly experienced in backend Java development and proficient with Azure.
* Results-oriented: you deliver what is needed, when it is needed.
* Pragmatic: you enjoy new technology but choose what best solves the current problem while limiting technical debt.
* Humble and grounded: you listen, collaborate, and keep the team's health in mind.
* Independent yet collaborative: you take initiative but thrive in teamwork.
* User-focused: the end user's experience is always your guiding star.


**Qualifications**
* Extensive experience in Java backend development (main requirement).
* Experience with Spring Boot and modern development practices.
* Solid understanding of Microservices and integrations.
* Professional proficiency in English.


**What We Offer**
* Impactful work: Your code directly powers secure identity services used by real customers worldwide.
* A pragmatic environment: We value smart choices over shiny tools. You'll use the most adapted technologies to solve problems, reduce complexity, and limit future technical debt.
* A healthy team culture: We believe in humility, collaboration, and keeping team well-being in balance with delivery goals.
* End-to-end responsibility: You'll see the whole lifecycle, from development through deployment to customer use.
* Growth into leadership: Over time, you'll have the opportunity to take on a bigger role in driving initiatives and supporting others in the team.

title: Quality Engineering Lead (Test Lead)
description:
Accenture söker nu erfarna testledare som vill vara med och vidareutveckla vårt erbjudande inom Quality Engineering. Hos oss arbetar du med några av Sveriges ledande bolag inom olika branscher och bidrar till att kvalitetssäkra verksamhetskritiska IT‑lösningar.
   

  

 I rollen som Quality Engineering Lead arbetar du med testledning i komplexa och varierande uppdrag. Du har en central roll i att ta fram, utveckla och implementera teststrategier, testplaner och arbetssätt som är anpassade efter kundens behov och förutsättningar.
   

  

 Du leder och koordinerar tvärfunktionella team och säkerställer effektiv testning genom hela utvecklingskedjan, där testautomatisering är en självklar och integrerad del. Du använder även ny teknik, inklusive AI, för att analysera testresultat och bidra med insikter som stödjer kontinuerlig förbättring av både produkt och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Som Quality Engineering Lead bidrar du med ett tryggt och inkluderande ledarskap. Du skapar struktur, riktning och engagemang i teamet, samtidigt som du självständigt kan hantera både strategiska och operativa frågeställningar. Genom att dela med dig av din erfarenhet och kompetens bidrar du till ett arbetssätt som skapar långsiktigt värde för både kund och team.
   

  

 På Accenture har vi ett tydligt fokus på lärande och långsiktig kompetensutveckling. Genom vårt globala nätverk av kollegor, experter och resurser inom Quality Engineering finns goda möjligheter att fortsätta utvecklas professionellt och fördjupa din expertis över tid.
   

  

**Det här ser vi fram emot att du bidrar med:**
- Flerårig erfarenhet av test och testledning

- God förståelse för testprocesser, metoder och verktyg

- Erfarenhet av att ta fram och implementera teststrategier och testplaner

- Erfarenhet av testautomatisering samt tillhörande ramverk och verktyg

- Kunskap om molnplattformar som Azure, GCP eller AWS

- Erfarenhet av både traditionella och agila arbetssätt, samt DevOps‑processer

- En tydlig och trygg kommunikationsförmåga

- Flytande svenska i tal och skrift

- Relevant utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande erfarenhet

- Certifiering inom test, till exempel ISTQB Foundation, är meriterande

title: Senior Java Fullstackutvecklare med AI-fokus
description:
Vill du arbeta med modern Javautveckling och samtidigt använda AI som en naturlig del i hur vi bygger och utvecklar system?
 



 Hos oss får du kombinera senior systemutveckling med att arbeta praktiskt med AI – både i din egen utveckling och i lösningar hos kund.
 



 Vi söker nu en senior fullstackutvecklare inom Java som vill vara med och bygga hållbara digitala lösningar tillsammans med oss på Accelerate – och samtidigt bidra till hur AI används i våra leveranser.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som senior fullstackutvecklare hos oss är du en nyckelperson både tekniskt och strategiskt. Du arbetar med modern Javautveckling och är samtidigt med och utvecklar hur AI används i verkliga system, Du kommer arbeta med kunder i olika faser av sin AI-resa – från att införa AI-assistenter i utvecklingsarbetet till att bygga mer avancerade AI-drivna lösningar i produktion.
 



  





**I rollen kommer du bland annat att:** 



* Utveckla och underhålla mikrotjänstbaserade backendlösningar i Java/Spring Boot
* Bygga moderna frontendlösningar med React, Angular eller liknande
* Integrera AI i befintliga system och affärsflöden
* Designa och implementera agentflöden och AI-drivna processer som fungerar i verkliga system
* Arbeta med AI genom hela utvecklingslivscykeln – från kod och test till drift och förbättring
* Säkerställa att lösningar byggs robust, säkert och med god spårbarhet enligt DevOps-principer
* Arbeta nära DevOps med CI/CD, containerisering och molnmiljöer
* Delta i arkitektur och designbeslut samt agera mentor för mer juniora kollegor



  





 Du använder också AI som ett verktyg i din egen utveckling, exempelvis för att effektivisera kodning, testning, dokumentation och felsökning med verktyg som GitHub Copilot, Claude Code och liknande.
 



  





 I vissa uppdrag arbetar du inom etablerade tekniska ramar, medan du i andra får vara med och påverka hur AI används i lösningar och affärsflöden. En viktig del av rollen är att kunna guida kunder i hur AI kan användas och översätta teknik till konkreta lösningar och affärsvärde.
 



  





**AI-verktyg och tekniker** 




 Vi jobbar inte med allt – men har erfarenhet av flera av följande tekniker beroende på uppdrag:
 


* OpenAI / Azure OpenAI
* Google Gemini / Vertex AI
* Claude (Anthropic)
* GitHub Copilot, Claude Code och liknande AI-assistenter



  





 Du behöver inte ha erfarenhet av allt ovan – men vi ser gärna att du har arbetat praktiskt med AI i någon form, till exempel genom integrationer, automation eller i din egen utvecklingsprocess.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Du har minst 8 års erfarenhet som fullstackutvecklare, med djup kompetens inom Java och moderna webbteknologier. Du trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, arkitektur och verksamhet och gillar att se lösningar fungera i verkligheten
 



  





**Vi tror att du:** 



* Tänker långsiktigt kring kod, arkitektur och förvaltning
* Gillar att bygga robusta lösningar som håller i produktion
* Har ett intresse för hur AI kan användas praktiskt i systemutveckling
* Är prestigelös och delar gärna kunskap
* Trivs i kundnära sammanhang
* Har en relevant akademisk examen inom IT, datateknik eller systemvetenskap
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska



  





 För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Bakgrundskontroll genomförs på slutkandidat.
 



  





**Tekniker vi tror att du har erfarenhet av:** 



* Java, Spring Boot
* Java EE / Jakarta EE
* ypeScript / JavaScript
* React, Angular eller liknande
* MySQL, Oracle
* CI/CD-verktyg
* Docker & Kubernetes



  





**Extra plus** 



* Systemarkitektur eller teknisk ledarroll
* Molnplattformar (Azure, AWS, GCP)
* Erfarenhet av AI-integrationer eller LLM-baserade lösningar
* Testautomatisering och TDD
* Certifieringar inom Java eller moln
* Förmåga att dokumentera och förklara komplexa tekniska lösningar



  





**Varför Accelerate?** 




 Hos oss får du mer än bara ett uppdrag – du får en plattform för att växa. Vi kombinerar teknisk kompetens med nyfikenhet på ny teknik och fokuserar på att bygga lösningar som håller
 



 över tid.Hos oss får du tillgång till moderna AI-verktyg och plattformar (t.ex. Copilot, Claude, m.fl.) för att kunna utforska, lära och effektivisera ditt arbete
 **.** 




  





**Som konsult hos får du:** 



* En skräddarsydd utvecklings- och certifieringsplan
* Utmanande och varierande uppdrag med modern teknik
* Möjlighet att arbeta med både klassisk systemutveckling och AI-relaterade lösningar
* Flexibilitet och balans mellan jobb och privatliv
* Trygg anställning med bra förmåner och kollektivavtal
* Ett sammansvetsat team av erfarna specialister



  





**Övrigt** 




 Placeringsort: Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete. Vi intervjuar löpande – vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan. Önskad start: snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.
 



 Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
 



 Välkommen till Accelerate!

title: Senior .Net-utvecklare till Nexer
description:
2026 innebär nya behov och ökade förväntningar inom offentlig sektor, där stabila och långsiktiga digitala lösningar är avgörande för att verksamheter ska fungera effektivt. För dig som vill arbeta nära organisationer där tekniken har en konkret påverkan på samhällsnyttan erbjuder vi uppdrag där din kompetens gör tydlig skillnad.
   

  

 Som konsult hos Nexer får du en trygg och långsiktig anställning med möjlighet att utvecklas i uppdrag som är viktiga för samhället. Vi tror på hållbar kompetensutveckling, balans i livet och att du ska få växa både tekniskt och som person
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som utvecklare hos oss bidrar du till att designa, bygga och vidareutveckla applikationer för samhällskritiska miljöer. Du arbetar med hela utvecklingsprocessen, från behovsanalys till lansering och samarbetar i tvärfunktionella team där problemlösning och kunskapsutbyte står i fokus. Rollen kräver teknisk nyfikenhet, kreativt tänkande och förmåga att omsätta komplexa behov till fungerande lösningar.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du är en person som trivs i team där samarbete, öppenhet och prestigelöshet är grunden för att lyckas. Du är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och gillar att ta initiativ. Du har lätt för att kommunicera och vill vara med och bygga hållbara lösningar som gör skillnad.
   

  

 Nexer Public Sales söker erfarna utvecklare inom C#/.Net. Du som söker behöver ha minst 9 års yrkeserfarenhet inom .Net-ramverket, REST API:er samt SQL-databaser.
   

  

 Vi ser gärna att du har en system- eller datavetenskaplig utbildning och det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av Angular, React och Azure Devops. Har du dessutom arbetat inom offentlig sektor är det ett stort plus.
   

  

 För rollen krävs svenskt medborgarskap och mycket god förmåga att kommunicera på svenska, både muntligt och skriftligt samt att du kan vara på plats i Stockholm.
   

  

**Om Nexer Public Sales**
 Affärsområdet Public Sales på Nexer har länge arbetat med att driva och utveckla våra uppdrag inom offentlig sektor, myndigheter, regioner och kommuner. Nu tar vi nästa steg och skapar en ännu starkare plattform och närvaro i Mälardalsregionen. Hos oss får du inte bara arbeta med samhällsviktiga uppdrag, du får också vara med och påverka, forma kulturen och bygga upp något tillsammans med oss.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Välkommen att söka tjänsten genom att skicka in din ansökan här nedan. Enligt GDPR hanterar vi inte ansökningar via e-post, men har du frågor om tjänsten eller Nexer är du varmt välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare, Xie Gamboa, på xie.gamboa@nexergroup.com.
   

  

 Vi går igenom ansökningarna löpande, så vänta inte med att söka!

title: Staff ML Scientist
description:
**About Us**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.


Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

**Job Description**

* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning products with a focus on online prediction.
* Build and maintain infrastructure and tooling as a platform for data scientists.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate ML solutions into production systems.
* Monitor and maintain the performance and reliability of ML models post-deployment.
* Stay current with the latest advancements in machine learning and related technologies.


This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.

**Qualifications**


Required: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Comfortable work with multi-cloud setup and experience with AWS or/and GCP and containerized environment like Kubernetes. Solid understanding of machine learning lifecycle and fundamentals. Expertise in Python. Familiarity with Terraform, GitHub and GitHub Actions. Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Bonus Qualifications: Experience with Vertex AI, specifically in online prediction. Experience with Cloud Run and Workload Identity Federation. Experience with kubeflow pipelines Experience with Triton inference server and TensorRT Understanding of data security and privacy regulations.**Visa is an EEO Employer**


Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Manager / Senior Manager, Data & Analytics
description:

title: Engagement Manager - Automotive
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Delivery Excellence
* ID 442722-en\_US

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


Engagement Manager - Automotive


As an Engagement Manager within Capgemini Engineering, you will be responsible for providing leadership and direction to support our growth and transformation within the automotive domain. You will oversee client engagements within Vehicle Engineering, ensuring successful delivery, customer satisfaction, and long‑term value creation.

*In this role you will play a key role in:*

* Managing Capgemini’s and our client’s expectations throughout the engagement.
* Ensuring full compliance with delivery requirements (scope, timeline, budget, quality).
* Handling and resolving client requests, needs, and concerns proactively.
* Building and maintaining strong relationships with client stakeholders.
* Managing the end‑to‑end engagement strategy, tracking progress, metrics, and reporting performance.

Your profile

* Minimum 10 years’ experience within the Automotive industry, especially Vehicle Engineering systems such as Body Electronics, interior/exterior function development, lighting, and related areas.
* Understanding of hardware, software, and system integration aspects of vehicle development.
* Proven track record in operational management, project management and project delivery.
* Strong communication, leadership, problem‑solving and crisis‑management skills.
* Experience working with Volvo Cars is meritorious.

*Note: For this position you need to have a valid Swedish work permit and/or Swedish residency.*


What we believe you will enjoy about working here


Innovative Environment: With us, you'll have the opportunity to work with the latest technology and be part of a dynamic team that loves creating value through innovation.  

Career Development: We care about your future and offer development programs and certifications in the latest technologies, so you can grow and become the best version of yourself.  

Flexible Work: We understand that life is more than just work. That's why we offer opportunities for remote work and flexible hours to help you feel good and thrive.  

Team Spirit: We're like one big family with a strong sense of team spirit. By living our core values—courage, passion, teamwork, and entrepreneurship—we create a work environment where everyone can feel at home.


Application


The assignment is based in Gothenburg.


As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted.




Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Software Product Manager
description:
**Luminator Technology Group** is the preferred global provider of high quality transportation solutions.  

  

Our products enhance operational efficiency, passenger counting accuracy, safety, route scheduling optimization, and maintenance detection. With technology deployed in over 50,000 railcars and 56,000 buses across 85 countries, Luminator is shaping the future of real-time decision-making in transit systems. (www.luminator.com)  

  

We are proud to employ the best people who are dedicated to the success of our customers and stakeholders.  

  

We are currently looking for an experienced **Software Product Manager** to support our engineering team.  

  

Lead our global efforts in creating and optimizing cutting-edge software solutions. Oversee the entire product lifecycle—from ideation to launch and post-launch optimization—while collaborating with engineering, design, and business teams to build impactful solutions, drive growth, and enhance user experiences.  

  

**What you will do:**  

  

**Key Responsibilities*** Define and execute global product vision, strategy, and roadmap
* Translate customer and market insights into clear product requirements
* Drive end‑to‑end product development from ideation to launch
* Collaborate cross‑functionally with engineering, design, sales, and marketing
* Champion user‑centric design and exceptional user experience
* Monitor competition and refine product positioning
* Lead global go‑to‑market strategies
* Define and execute AI strategy for software products
* Set KPIs, track performance, and optimize products throughout their lifecycle
* Communicate progress, risks, and results to senior stakeholders

  


**Values & Behaviors**  

Team player, trusted advisor, results‑driven, focused on continuous improvement.  

  

**Skills & Tools**  

English and Swedish; experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, Google) and IoT device management.  

  

**Reporting Line**  

Reports to the Product Management Director.  

  

**What we are looking for:**  

* *Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field required.*

**Strong experience with:*** Extensive experience in software product management, preferably with cloud-hosted software (Azure, AWS, Google, etc.) and digital content or IoT device management.
* Strong understanding of software engineering principles and communication protocols (wired, wireless, TCP/IP). Knowledge of marketing strategies, sales techniques, and customer experience principles.
* Ability to analyze complex problems, synthesize data, and develop innovative solutions.
* Exceptional collaboration and communication abilities (written and verbal) influence cross-functional teams and stakeholders.
* Strong ability to effectively read, write, and communicate in English.
* Familiarity with product analytics, data visualization tools, and user experience design principles.
* Proven success launching innovative products and staying ahead of industry trends

**What’s there for you:**  

* **Flexible working hours** and **hybrid options** that let you shape your schedule to fit your life.
* **Wellness allowance and glasses support**
* **Life insurance**
* **Occupational health care support**
* **Development** opportunities.
* Access to online **language school**.
* Working in a **multinational environment**.
* Access to the full **LinkedIn Learning** portfolio.
* Regular **team events** and celebrations.

  

It looks like the next step in your career, doesn’t it?  

  

Let’s discuss the details!  

  

Apply now or contact our Talent Acquisition HR Business Partner: magdalena.klimkowska@luminator.com

title: Nattreceptionist sommar Scandic Borlänge
description:
Ansök nu
* Ansök senast: 26 april 2026
* Borlänge
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

Scandic Borlänge är ett familjärt hotell mitt i city, nära centralstationen och shoppingen på Norra Backa. Här kan våra gäster njuta av god mat i vår restaurang, varva ner i vår inomhuspool eller bara umgås i vår lobby. På hotellet lägger vi stor vikt vid att erbjuda våra medarbetare en bra arbetsmiljö – ett gott ledarskap i en varm och familjär atmosfär. Vi tar inte bara väl hand om våra gäster, vi tar alltid hand om varandra. Vi jobbar tillsammans, sida vid sida, för att nå vårt gemensamma mål- att skapa hotellupplevelser i absolut världsklass för våra gäster.


**Nu söker vi en Nattreceptionist till Scandic Borlänge.**



Oavsett varför gästen kommer till oss är det få saker som är så uppskattade som ett vänligt ansikte som hälsar välkommen. Du agerar värd tillsammans med övriga teamet på hotellet och skapar en gästupplevelse i världsklass.



Hos oss får du ta ett stort eget ansvar för att ta de beslut som krävs för att göra gästen nöjd och teamen utvecklar och förbättrar arbetssätt och service i takt med att omvärlden förändras. Vi är nämligen övertygade om att det är när du får utvecklas och bidra med all din kompetens och erfarenhet som vi överträffar gästens förväntningar. På köpet får vi kul på jobbet!



Så ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss – och bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic!


**Vad är innebär rollen?**



Du som arbetar i receptionen är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Ser till att gästens önskemål uppfylls. Du har alltid ett leende på läpparna och en kreativ lösning i bakfickan. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. Din arbetsplats är vår lobby. För det är där du möter flest gäster. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning.


Arbetet i receptionen innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet. Allt arbete sker med gästnöjdhet och försäljning i fokus.


Hotellet har öppet dygnet runt.

**Vem är du?**



För att passa i rollen tror vi att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap plus är det om du arbetat i Opera eller något annat bokningssystem innan.



Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.


Allra viktigast är dock dina personliga egenskaper och din inställning. För att passa i rollen behöver du vara en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.


Ska ha fyllt 20 år


**Information om tjänsten**



Tjänsten är en sommar anställning på visstidsanställning på deltid.


Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!



Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!
company_description: Nordiskt hotellföretag i världsklass som skapar enastående upplevelser för de många människorna. 16 000 medarbetar, 280 hotell i 6 länder.

title: Head of Business Unit Naval Combat Systems
description:
What you will be part of


Naval Combat Systems is a business unit within Business Area Naval as of April 1st and consists of approximately 2,000 employees globally, across Sweden, Australia, Denmark, Finland, Germany, and Poland.


Naval Combat Systems provides customers with world-class situational awareness, decision support, force coordination, communication solutions, and precision engagement. Together, these deliver a winning solution for mission control.


The business unit has a strong presence in the global defence and security markets, close customer relationships, and rewarding international collaborations.


As Head of Naval Combat Systems, you will be responsible for a growing national and global business unit. You will also be responsible for the strategic development of “Command and Control,” one of Saab’s core areas.


Your role


As Head of Naval Combat Systems, you demonstrate a high level of business acumen and accountability in delivering on your commitments. The position is based in Stockholm, Sweden, and requires both national and international travel.


Your strong international leadership and general management skills will be crucial in continuing to develop our culture of trust, performance, accountability, transparency, innovation, teamwork, and continuous learning.


Furthermore, we are looking for a leader who provides strong guidance in a growing organization undergoing a transformation journey, effectively navigating complexity while driving strategic and operational change.


More specifically, the role includes:

* Profitability, growth, and sustainability of the global Naval Combat Systems business
* Full P&L responsibility, including order intake, for the global business
* Responsibility for business execution and product lifecycle management
* Strategic and financial business planning, as well as budgeting and forecasting
* Customer relations in close collaboration with Saab Operational Countries (Australia, Germany, the UK, and the US), other Country Units, and other Business Units within Saab


You will report to the Head of Business Area Naval and be part of the BA Naval Management Team.


Your experience and skills


To be successful in this role, we expect you to demonstrate a strong drive, collaboration skills, commitment, tenacity, and the ability to motivate and engage your employees. You are a confident communicator who leads through values, vision, and goals. You believe that behaviours are crucial to achieving our goals and act as a strong promoter of our Together as One culture.

* Proven ability to create and implement strategies that secure both growth and EBIT, with the ambition to exceed business plan targets
* Experience in complex international business and system-of-systems development
* As this is a software-intensive business, a solid understanding of software development, information security, cloud technologies, and related areas is required
* Strong people leadership: challenges employees to excel, embraces ambiguity and complexity, and uses coaching to develop capabilities
* Ability and passion to lead an international, complex, high-tech organization
* Ability to effectively communicate expectations and vision in a way that motivates and drives high performance and growth
* Strong financial management skills, including budgeting, control, and capital allocation
* Ability to establish and maintain a strong network of customers, local industrial partners, and other relevant stakeholders
company_description: Saab serves the global market with world-leading products, services and solutions from military defense to civil security.

title: Enterprise Architect Director (9443)
description:
**Chief Enterprise Architect**
==============================


Do you want to work in a global company where you can contribute to a more sustainable food production? DeLaval is a leading developer, manufacturer, and supplier of solutions for dairy farmers around the world. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers do more with less.  


#### **Role and responsibilities**

  



DeLaval is seeking a senior Chief Enterprise Architect to own, define, and govern the enterprise architecture of the DeLaval Group. The role has end-to-end accountability for ensuring that DeLaval’s business strategy is consistently translated into a coherent, secure, and scalable technology landscape across all business domains and geographies.

The Chief Enterprise Architect acts as the company’s architectural authority, balancing long-term strategic direction with near-term execution, and ensuring that digital investments deliver measurable business value while reducing complexity and technical risk.

This role provides enterprise-wide leadership through mandate, governance, and influence. It does not initially include direct line management but carries clear functional leadership across a federated architecture community.  


**Scope and Mandate**  



The Chief Enterprise Architect has enterprise-level accountability for enterprise architecture principles, target states, and roadmaps; architecture governance, decision frameworks, and compliance; alignment between business strategy, operating model, and technology; and architectural coherence across ERP, CRM, CPQ, digital, IoT, data, and integration platforms. The Chief Enterprise Architect reports to the CIO.  


**Key Responsibilities**
* Enterprise Architecture Strategy
* Define and continuously evolve DeLaval’s enterprise architecture strategy and target architecture.
* Translate business strategy, growth ambitions, and industry trends into actionable architectural roadmaps.
* Ensure architectural decisions support scalability, security, sustainability, and time-to-market.
* Architecture Governance & Decision-Making
* Own and operate DeLaval’s enterprise architecture governance model.
* Define architecture artefacts, principles, standards, and reference architectures.
* Govern solution design and major initiatives.

  


**Technology & Platform Leadership**  


* Set enterprise direction for core business platforms, integration and API strategy, cloud and infrastructure architecture, and digital and IoT platforms.
* Drive simplification, reuse, and reduction of technical debt.

  


**Information & Data Architecture**  


* Own the enterprise information and data architecture.
* Define enterprise information models, data domains, and principles.
* Establish readiness for analytics and AI.

  


**Business & Stakeholder Collaboration**  


* Act as a strategic advisor to the CIO and senior leaders.
* Bridge business and IT.

  


**Architecture Community Leadership**  


* Provide functional leadership to solution and domain architects.
* Establish an enterprise architecture community of practice.

  


**Success Measures**  


* Reduced complexity, faster delivery, increased reuse, stronger business alignment, and improved data quality.

  


**Strategic Impact**  



This role is central to DeLaval’s evolution into a digitally enabled, data-driven enterprise.  


#### **Qualifications**



To be successful in this role we believe that you have:  


* Several years of experience in enterprise or solution architecture.
* Strong ability to translate business strategy into architecture roadmaps.
* Experience with ERP, CRM, digital platforms, IoT, cloud, and data architecture.
* Solid understanding of architecture frameworks and governance (e.g., TOGAF).
* Skilled in driving simplification, standardization, and reducing technical debt.
* Strong stakeholder skills and ability to lead through influence.
* Excellent communicator who can bridge business and IT.
* Proven experience in driving projects and leading transformation.

  


#### **Working at DeLaval**



Our core values Passion, People, Professionals and Partnerships connect individuals across entities and geographies. Success is far more than knowledge – it is strongly related to behaviour. At DeLaval we are all guided by our three behaviours: Set Direction, Make Things Happen and One DeLaval.  



We offer you a workplace like no other, where state-of-the-art technology goes hand in hand with animal welfare. DeLaval is a part of the Tetra Laval Group together with Tetra Pak and Sidel. In addition, we offer:
* Secure employment and benefits from the collective agreement (occupational pension, work-related accident insurance).
* Parental leave compensation (approx. 10 percent of the employee's monthly salary).
* Wellness allowance of SEK 4 000/year.
* Private healthcare insurance.
* Flexible working hours and reduced working hours.

  


#### **Additional information**



This is a full-time permanent position based at DeLaval’s headquarters in Tumba, south of Stockholm. We offer a hybrid workplace model, allowing flexibility to work remotely.  



We review applications ongoing. We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact us.  


#### **Contact**



Hiring manager: Jesper Särnholm, CIO and Vice President of Information Technology, jesper.sarnholm@delaval.com

Recruiter: Mathias Gunnstedt, Mathias.Gunnstedt@delaval.com  


#### **About DeLaval**



Our vision is to make sustainable food production possible. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers, dairy farmers, do more with less by providing world-leading milking equipment and solutions.  



Today, DeLaval has approximately 4,500 passionate professionals operating in more than 100 markets around the world. DeLaval is part of the Tetra Laval Group. See more at corporate.delaval.com

title: Sales Consultant - Graduate
description:
Sales Consultant - Graduate  



This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE partner/customer office.**Who We Are:**


Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

  



Join our team as a Graduate Sales Consultant and develop your career in a fast-paced, **client-oriented services IT environment**.


You’ll gain hands-on experience in **consultative selling, working with businesses to provide tailored service solutions that drive value**.

**Start Date**: 1 September 2026

**Location:** Stockholm, Sweden

**What you’ll do:**

As a Graduate Sales Consultant, you will be responsible to offer solutions for our customers to operate and maintain their environments.

* Build and manage relationships with new and existing clients
* Identify business needs and propose tailored service solutions
* Support the full sales cycle: prospecting, meetings, proposals, and follow-up
* Contribute to revenue growth through upselling and cross-selling
* Collaborate with internal teams to ensure high-quality service delivery
* Stay informed about market trends and client challenges

**What We’re Looking For :**

* **Recently completed/graduated** **(****graduation** **within** **the** **last** **12** **months)****from a Bachelor’s or Master’s** with a focus in sales/marketing, computer science, international business/management, finance/economics, or related
* Strong interest in sales and client relationship management
* Excellent listening, communication and interpersonal skills
* Commercial mindset with a drive to achieve results
* Proactive, curious, and eager to learn
* Team player with a positive attitude
* The drive to seek out what’s next and to deliver exceptional results
* A collaborative, solution focused spirit and overall sense of urgency
* The desire to embrace new ideas and fresh thinking and seek out ideas different than your own
* Experience as an active leader on campus who strives to make a positive impact on the world
* Comfort with working in a hybrid (virtual and face-to-face) environment
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills and the ability to ask smart questions

**What you can expect from us:**

* Clear career progression path in client management, sales and account management
* A dynamic, supportive, and growth-oriented environment
* Competitive salary with performance-based incentives and great benefits

**Why Join Us?**

* This is more than just a job — **it’s the start of your career in sales**. You’ll develop key skills in negotiation, client management, and business development while working in an environment that values initiative, learning, and success.

We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
