title: Lead AI Architect
description:
Bygg nästa generations AI-lösningar – från idé till produktion
  
AI förändrar hur organisationer arbetar, fattar beslut och skapar värde. Men att gå från experiment till skalbara AI-lösningar i produktion är fortfarande en av de största utmaningarna för många organisationer.
  
Är du trött på att AI fastnar i styrgrupper och processer? Eller trött på att bygga smarta demos utan att kunna ta dem hela vägen till robust produktion hos kund? Accelerate är i en sweet spot mellan storbolagets muskler och startupens tempo. Du får jobba med kunder och uppdrag som kräver senioritet, ansvar och säker leverans, men i en organisation där beslut tas snabbt och där du faktiskt får påverka riktning, best practices och hur vi bygger AI-lösningar över tid.
  
Nu söker vi en Lead AI Architect som vill designa och bygga moderna AI-lösningar, från idé och proof-of-concept till stabila system i produktion.
  
  

I rollen får du arbeta med
  
  

AI-agenter och autonoma AI-system
  
  

LLM-baserade applikationer och AI-drivna tjänster
  
  

RAG-arkitekturer och kunskapsbaserade AI-lösningar
  
  

integration av AI i verksamhetsprocesser och befintliga system
  
  

AI-lösningar som används i produktion hos ledande organisationer
  
  

Din roll
  
Som Lead AI Architect på Accelerate, arbetar du både kundnära och strategisk. Du är den som driver Accelerates tekniska förflyttning inom AI, från kompetensutveckling och arkitekturprinciper till konkreta leveranser hos kund.
  
Du sätter teknisk riktning, etablerar arkitekturprinciper och säkerställer att lösningarna är skalbara, säkra och hållbara över tid. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med både utvecklingsteam och verksamhet, där du fungerar som teknisk ledare i AI-initiativ från idé till produktion.
  
Du arbetar både strategiskt och hands-on och hjälper organisationer att fatta rätt tekniska beslut kring hur AI ska implementeras i praktiken.
  
Du har förmåga att välja rätt nivå av AI, från enkla regelbaserade lösningar till avancerade LLM-arkitekturer baserat på verksamhetsnytta, risk och kostnad.
  
  

Vad du kommer att göra
  
  

delta och driva kunddialoger och workshops för att identifiera AI-möjligheter
  
  

etablera arkitekturprinciper, mönster och best practices för att säkerställa långsiktigt hållbara AI-lösningar
  
  

guida utvecklingsteam och fungera som tekniskt bollplank för arkitekter, tech leads och sälj i AI-relaterade frågor
  
  

designa och etablera MLOps/LLMOps-arkitekturer för säker, spårbar och skalbar AI i produktion
  
  

arbeta med livscykelhantering av modeller och prompts i miljöer med höga krav på kvalitet och kontroll
  
  

Agera som AI-evangelist och mentor som driver kompetensförflyttningen mot AI
  
  

bidra till att paketera och produktifiera Accelerates AI-erbjudande
  
  

Vi erbjuder dig
  
Vi erbjuder en platt organisation där du slipper långa beslutsvägar. Du får mandatet att forma hur ett framgångsrikt nordiskt konsultbolag på 250 personer arbetar med AI framåt, både genom att sätta standarden internt och genom att leda de mest utmanande kundprojekten. Självklart med stor flexibilitet, en stark gemenskap med specialister som brinner för teknik och innovation.
  
Vi tror på en kultur där nyfikenhet, kunskapsdelning och kontinuerligt lärande är centralt.
  
  

Vem söker vi?
  
Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att ta AI-lösningar från design till produktion och som är van att bära tekniskt ansvar i komplexa miljöer. Du trivs i en konsultroll där du arbetar nära både teknik och verksamhet.
  
Du är bekväm i rollen som teknisk ledare och har förmåga att sätta riktning, fatta arkitekturbeslut och vägleda utvecklingsteam.
  
Erfarenhet av att arbeta i reglerade, offentliga eller säkerhetsklassade miljöer är starkt meriterande eftersom det ofta en förutsättning i våra uppdrag.
  
  

**Vi tror att du även har erfarenhet av:**  

Python och backend-utveckling
  
  

LLM-baserade system och agentramverk
  
  

RAG-arkitekturer och vektordatabaser
  
  

Cloudplattformar som Azure eller AWS
  
  

MLOps eller LLMOps, CI/CD och containerteknik
  
  

Du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska.
  
  

Meriterande
  
  

erfarenhet av att ta arkitekturansvar i AI- eller dataplattformar erfarenhet av dataplattformar som Databricks, Synapse eller Microsoft Fabric
  
  

erfarenhet av att balansera innovation med krav på säkerhet, juridik och informationsklassning
  
  

Om Accelerate
  
Accelerate är ett nordiskt konsultföretag med över 250 specialister i Sverige och Norge. Vi hjälper organisationer att utveckla digitala lösningar inom AI, data, systemutveckling, integration, Cloud & infrastruktur.
  
Tillsammans med våra kunder bygger vi lösningar som driver innovation och skapar verkligt värde.
  
  

Förmåner
  
Som anställd på Accelerate erbjuder vi förutom spännande uppdrag och tekniker:
  
  

Utbildning & certifieringar via våra partners (Red Hat, HashiCorp, GitLab, Microsoft m.fl.)
  
  

En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner
  
  

Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och sjukvårdsförsäkring
  
  

Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
  
  

Att bli del i ett passionerat team med tekniskt vassa kollegor
  
  

Vi tror på gemenskap och kompetensutbyte – här utvecklas vi tillsammans och stöttar varandra för att alltid ligga i framkant.
  
  

Placeringsort
  
Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Göteborg, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
  
Vi intervjuar löpande – vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan!
  
Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.

title: Digital Project Manager Healthcare Software
description:
Digital Project Manager – Healthcare Software
  
Make your next move matter
  
We are looking for an experienced Digital Project Manager – Healthcare Software to accelerate the development, deployment, and scaling of next‑generation digital health solutions.
  
In this role, you will collaborate with data scientists, clinicians, and product teams to turn insights into real‑world impact, faster and smarter. If you are passionate about cloud-native engineering, responsible AI, and using cutting‑edge technologies to advance global health, keep on reading.
  
Our aim is to establish a full new team of 10 dedicated colleagues, all committed to build a strong team and deliver the extraordinary in our aim to innovate and build the next generation digital health solutions. We believe we do this in close day-to-day collaboration in the headquarters of Mölnlycke, situated in GoCo, Mölndal/Gothenburg.
  
  

What you’ll do
  
As Digital Project Manager, you will lead the end to end delivery of healthcare software initiatives, from early stage innovation and needs discovery, through scaled high quality implementation. The role translates clinical, technical, and business insights into clearly defined problems, validated concepts, and tangible product increments while ensuring alignment with clinical value, regulatory requirements, and strategic goals. It involves coordinating cross functional stakeholders to deliver secure, compliant digital health solutions and driving early concept validation through rapid prototyping and real-world testing, including projects that span embedded software, IoT, and device–cloud architectures. You will role model with situational leadership, drive lessons learned and secure knowledge transfer within the organization.
  
  

**Other key responsibilities for the role:**  

Lead end to end delivery of healthcare software initiatives across the full lifecycle from early discovery to launch, ensuring clinical value, regulatory compliance, and strategic alignment.
  
Lead early-stage innovation and concept validation, including unmet need identification, opportunity prioritization, and business case development aligned with Bio-design principles.
  
Lead project planning, execution, and delivery performance, including scope, timelines, resources, budgets, and KPIs.
  
Proactively lead risk assessment, compliance, and quality oversight, ensuring patient safety, regulatory adherence, and release readiness.
  
Drive forecast/budgeting and vendor accountability, including management of R&D budgets, external partners, and contracted deliverables.
  
Lead change, adoption, and delivery success, supporting go live, user adoption, stabilization, and continuous improvement.
  
Lead continuous improvement of delivery frameworks and governance, contributing to best practices, playbooks, and data driven decision making.
  
**Stakeholder Management:** Secure involvement and commitment, communicate progress, flag risks, and ensure quality in project reporting.
  
  

If all that sounds appealing, then here is what we would like you to demonstrate:  
  
University degree, preferably in Software Engineering, Health Informatics, Computer Science, or other relevant area, or equivalent mix of education and experience
  
5+ years managing digital or software development projects, preferably in healthcare/health-tech.
  
Experience with early-stage innovation projects, needs-finding, concept development, and feasibility work.
  
Familiarity with, or training in, the Stanford Bio-design approach.
  
Proven delivery of cross functional projects from discovery through launch.
  
Experience coordinating clinical stakeholders and navigating healthcare delivery environments.
  
Track record with Agile methodologies, including backlog management and iterative development.
  
Experience managing budgets, vendors, and partnerships.
  
Experience in working with AI-powered development projects
  
High proficiency in English.
  
  

**Additional experience we see as a benefit for the role:**  

**Agile/PM:** PSM/PSPO, CSM, SAFe, ACP, PMP.
  
**Innovation/Design:** Design Thinking, Bio-design courses/fellowships, human-centered design certifications.
  
**Technical:** API, cloud fundamentals, cybersecurity or privacy courses.
  
  

What can we offer you?
  
A collaborative environment with friendly colleagues in a global organisation that values openness, fairness, and teamwork.
  
**Competitive benefits package:** annual bonus, pension plan, health insurance, and wellness contribution.
  
A great workplace in the beautiful new head quarter in the GoCo, Mölndal. A place you gladly spend the required 3 days in office per week.
  
Flexible working hours and a supportive work-from-home policy.
  
  

Our approach to Diversity and Inclusion
  
We’re building a workplace where everyone feels seen, heard, and valued. We believe that a diverse mix of people (from different cultures, ages, geographies, and genders) makes us stronger. It brings fresh perspectives, drives better decisions, and helps us deliver solutions that reflect the world we serve. Inclusion isn’t just a value, it’s how we work, grow, and lead together.
  
Please contact hiring manager Daniel Bünger von Wurm, Daniel.Bunger@molnlycke.com, if you have any questions about the role.
  
  

Please submit your application by April 12, 2026.

title: Hotellreceptionist- Sommarjobb 2026
description:
Nu söker vi receptionister till sommaren och extra vid behov
  
Receptionister till Scandic Värnamo!
  
Vare sig du välkomnar gäster till ett av våra 121 hotellrum eller till våra 7 konferenslokaler så kommer du konstant möta besökare från hela världen. Till Scandic Värnamo kommer våra gäster bland annat för att bo, lobbyjobba, njuta av en AW eller för att uppleva en oförglömlig middag i Proseccobaren eller Sinatrabaren. Hos oss kommer du att arbeta med kollegor som vet vad det lilla extra för gästen innebär och tillsammans skapa de bästa gästupplevelserna.
  
Vill du ta chansen att bli en i teamet hos oss i sommar? Trivs du i en miljö med högt tempo och drivs av att hitta lösningar då är det dig vi letar efter!
  
Du ska älska mötet med gästen och har förmågan att snabbt skapa goda relationer. Du tar initiativ, är flexibel för förändringar och har en god förmåga att se lösningar. Du kan hantera stressiga situationer och samtidigt prioritera rätt saker. Att kunna arbeta bra i team och vara en omtänksam kollega ser vi som en självklarhet.
  
  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter är bland annat följande:**  

Checka in och ut gäster i vårt system Opera Cloud.
  
Koordinera alla avdelningar för att möta våra gästers önskemål.
  
Svara på frågor från våra gäster.
  
Bidra till merförsäljning.
  
  

**Information om tjänsten:**  

Det här är en anställning för sommaren 2026 v 27-31 med möjlighet till förlängning. Arbetet är förlagt till både dag- och kvällstid samt även helger. Vi håller intervjuer löpande så skicka din ansökan redan idag
  
Du behöver vara minst 20 år eftersom tjänsten innefattar ansvar för servering av alkohol samt rollen som serveringsansvarig, vilket enligt alkohollagen kräver att den serveringsansvarige har fyllt 20 år

title: Outcome Customer Engineer, Google Cloud Platform Delivery
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer-facing or support role.
* Experience in deployment planning, orchestration, or change management.
* Experience in programming languages, debugging, or systems design.
* Experience engaging with, presenting to, or influencing technical stakeholders or executive leaders.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience selling technical solutions in one or more of the following areas: Infrastructure Modernization, Application Modernization, Data Management, Data Analytics, AI, Networking, Migrations or Security.
* Experience with Google Cloud products and differentiation from competition.
* Experience working with product and capacity teams to resolve technical and capacity blockers.
* Experience with object-oriented programming languages (i.e. Python, Java), and using technical proficiencies to remove blockers and accelerate customer deployment.

**About the job**
-----------------


When leading companies choose Google Cloud, it's a huge win for spreading the power of cloud computing globally. Once educational institutions, government agencies, and other businesses sign on to use Google Cloud products, you come in to facilitate making their work more productive, mobile, and collaborative. You listen and deliver what is most helpful for the customer. You assist fellow sales Googlers by problem-solving key technical issues for our customers. You liaise with the product marketing management and engineering teams to stay on top of industry trends and devise enhancements to Google Cloud products.



As a Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Outcome Customer Engineer (OCE), you will drive initial and ongoing business ramp for our customers, clearing blockers and ensuring they get the maximum benefit from their investment faster. You will manage and execute the deployment plan, transitioning scoped workloads into production by providing technical leadership to customers and partners. You will have a direct impact on the velocity and incremental consumption of customer workloads, leading to accelerated value realization, higher adoption, and future expansion opportunities.  

  

You will blend sales expertise, market knowledge, direct technical engagement, and technical project management to prove the value of the Google Cloud portfolio.


Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Develop and orchestrate a structured, end-to-end deployment plan across customer, professional services, and partner teams, onboarding the implementation team, clearing blockers, managing timelines and progress, and ensuring readiness (e.g., capacity, training).
* Employ coding, debugging, or systems design to resolve technical blockers and accelerate deployment.
* Drive and track progress of the initial and ongoing ramp of workloads, moving customers from agreement to consumption as quickly as possible.
* Identify expansion opportunities for new workloads within the account during project execution.
* Drive sustainable product usage to help customers realize value on an ongoing basis and secure future contract renewals.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
**Company Description**  

It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.

 **Job Description**  

What you get to do in this role:

* Schedule appointments, plan meetings, and maintain complex and changing calendars, while working through scheduling roadblocks.
* Draft and prepare routine and advanced correspondence including emails, presentations and reports. Review outgoing correspondence for accuracy, format consistency, signatures and conformance with executive procedures.
* Assist leadership and organizations by optimizing usage of time. Make decisions regarding short-term priorities and work activities.
* Arrange all travel to ensure consistency within company procedures and support organization in obtaining necessary travel documents including Visa/passport, while maintaining Leadership expenses/credit card reconciliation.
* Identify issues within the organization and initiate or facilitate solutions.
* Assist internal departments with the setup of new hires.
* Assist new hires with processes including expense reporting and travel systems and other internal processes and tools. Compile, prepare and process Leadership expenses and credit card reconciliation where needed.

  

**Qualifications** **To be successful in this role you have:**

* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving. This may include using AI-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* 10+ years experience supporting VP level
* Highly organized with exceptional communication skills and ability to manage a variety of high priority projects from multiple management and professional levels
* Desire to grow and take on your own projects
* Professional demeanor and soft-skills
* Positive and personable can-do attitude
* Proficient in Zoom, Microsoft Office suites (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook), Box, Concur and Google Docs
* Experience handling confidential materials


FD21

 **Additional Information** **Work Personas**


We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

**Accommodations**


We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

**Export Control Regulations**


For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer | Predictions Team
description:
Every parcel we deliver starts with a prediction
  
At Instabee, our Predictions Team builds the forecasting engines that power one of Europe's fastest-growing logistics networks — from delivery volume predictions to real-time resource scheduling across five markets.
  
We work end-to-end. That means you won't hand off a notebook and call it done. You'll own the full lifecycle: data discovery, model development, production deployment, and ongoing monitoring. If that sounds like the kind of ownership you've been looking for, keep reading.
  
About Your Future Team
  
The Predictions Team sits at the core of how Instabee operates. We are a tight-knit group of engineers with a direct line to the decisions that shape our entire logistics network — from how routes are planned to how we staff our terminals weeks in advance.
  
We take end-to-end ownership seriously. We architect, deploy, and monitor production-grade systems that run at scale across five markets. Our forecasts aren't just nice-to-have insights; they are the inputs that drive real operational decisions every single day.
  
But great models alone aren't enough. We work closely with stakeholders across operations, commercial, and leadership — translating complex analytical outputs into clear, actionable insights that non-technical audiences can act on with confidence. Understanding the business behind the data is just as important to us as the engineering that powers it. The best solutions come from engineers who can sit in a room with a decision-maker, understand what they actually need, and build something that delivers exactly that.
  
We move fast, we care about craft, and we believe the best solutions come from engineers who understand both the data and the business. If you want to work on genuinely hard problems with people who take quality seriously — you'll fit right in.
  
What You'll Do
  
Design & Develop — Build and refine time-series and ML models that predict delivery volumes with high precision
  
  

Productionize — Take full ownership of deployment via robust CI/CD pipelines into production environments
  
  

Architect Infrastructure — Use containerization and orchestration tools to ensure prediction services scale with the business
  
  

Data Engineering — Collaborate on data collection and preprocessing logic
  
  

Monitor & Optimize — Track performance drift and maintain system health across deployed models
  
  

**Your Tech StackNeed to have:**  

Strong skills in Python and SQL
  
  

Strong command of time-series forecasting, neural networks, and tree-based models — built, shipped, and monitored in production
  
  

Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes — containerizing and orchestrating ML workloads in production
  
  

Proficiency in GCP (or similar) and Terraform — managing cloud infrastructure as code
  
  

**Nice to have:**  

Practical experience with stream processing (PubSub or similar) — building pipelines that power real-time predictions
  
  

Background in logistics or supply chain — you understand the operational reality behind the data
  
  

Hands-on experience with Python libraries such as Polars, Prophet, NeuralProphet, or PyTorch — applied to real forecasting challenges
  
  

Experience with orchestration tools such as Argo Workflows — scheduling and managing ML pipelines at scale
  
  

What You'll Get
  
Sky-high office with a 360° view over Stockholm
  
  

⏰ Flexible hybrid setup
  
  

Hack Days twice a year
  
  

Dog-friendly workplace
  
  

Wednesday Tech Breakfasts
  
  

Regular Tech Demos to stay close to what's coming next
  
  

Paid licenses for advanced dev tools and AI coding agents
  
  

Six months parental pay top-up
  
  

Your birthday off — every year
  
  

Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
  
Our Recruitment Process
  
TA Interview — A first conversation to get to know each other
  
  

Hiring Manager Interview — A deeper dive into your experience and ways of working
  
  

Technical Case — A chance to show us how you think and solve problems
  
  

Meet & Greet — A conversation with your future team
  
  

Reference Check — We'll speak to a couple of people who know your work
  
  

Background Control — A standard check for all hires in Sweden
  
  

Contract Signing — Welcome to Instabee!
  
  

This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.
  
Sound like your kind of challenge? We'd love to hear from you.
  
#LI-RR1

title: Specialist Solution Engineer - Sweden
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*

Job Category


Sales
Job Details


**About Salesforce**

Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.


Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.


**Salesforce** is looking for a motivated and technically strong **Solution Engineer** based in Stockholm to join our **Marketing Cloud** team in Northern Europe. In this role, you will help customers solve digital marketing challenges by connecting business needs with scalable technology solutions across the MarTech landscape.  



  

You will work closely with Account Executives, customers, and internal technical teams to design and demonstrate solutions based on Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP), and related marketing technologies. This role is ideal for someone who combines a strong technical foundation with practical MarTech knowledge and enjoys translating customer requirements into solution designs that support personalized, data-driven engagement.  



  

**Responsibilities:**

* **Business Problem Solving:** Take on complex business challenges, utilizing research and business assessment to define problems, generate innovative ideas, identify opportunities, and recommend actionable next steps.
* **Technical Solution Design:** Work with customers and internal teams to understand marketing, data, and activation requirements and translate them into solution designs using Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP), and adjacent MarTech capabilities.
* **MarTech Consulting:** Support customers in evaluating and improving their marketing technology setup, including customer data usage, campaign orchestration, segmentation, personalization, and channel execution.
* **Solution Demonstrations & Prototyping:** Deliver clear and relevant product demonstrations, build lightweight prototypes, and show how Salesforce solutions can address real customer use cases across the marketing lifecycle.
* **Data & Integration Understanding:** Contribute to solution discussions around integrations, APIs, data flows, identity resolution, and activation use cases. Help customers understand how Marketing Cloud and Data360 (CDP) fit into their broader technology ecosystem.
* **Discovery & Technical Validation:** Participate in discovery sessions to capture business and technical requirements, assess feasibility, and support the development of solution recommendations aligned to customer goals.
* **Cross-Functional Collaboration:** Partner with sales, solution engineering, services, product specialists, and customer success teams to support opportunities and deliver strong customer outcomes.
* **Continuous Learning:** Stay up to date on Salesforce product capabilities and broader MarTech trends, including customer data platforms, personalization, automation, and digital engagement.

  

**Qualifications**

  

**Experience:**

* 3+ years of experience in a similar role such as Solution Engineering, Digital Marketing, or technical consulting or development
* Language Skills: Fluency in both Swedish and English is required
* **MarTech Knowledge:** Good understanding of the MarTech ecosystem and how platforms for campaign management, customer data, segmentation, personalization, and activation work together.

**Technical Skills:**

* Good understanding of modern MarTech ecosystems and how data, activation, personalization, analytics, content, and integrations work together to enable customer engagement at scale. Experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Data360 (CDP) concepts and adjacent marketing technologies is valued, but not required.
* Familiarity with topics such as data federation, composable architecture, CDP, flexible data models, identity resolution, clean rooms, cross-channel activation, dynamic content, and performance measurement is a plus. The candidate should be able to explain technical concepts in business terms and understand Salesforce’s role within a broader MarTech stack and brings curiosity for emerging AI-driven and agentic marketing capabilities.
* The right candidate with a strong technical and/or developer background is also welcome to apply, even if you have limited Marketing domain knowledge
* Presentation and Communication Skills. Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to persuasively present complex technical and data-centric concepts to a variety of audiences, from technical teams to C-level executives.
* Problem Solving skills. Structured and solution-oriented mindset with the ability to analyze requirements, identify options, and propose practical next steps.
* Collaboration: Comfortable working in cross-functional teams and contributing to shared success across sales and technical organizations.
* Industry Background: Experience in B2C or digitally mature industries such as Retail, Consumer Goods, Travel, Media, or Financial Services is beneficial.

Unleash Your Potential


When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and *be your best* , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can *do your best* . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.


Accommodations


If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form .


Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.


Posting Statement


Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Technical Process Safety Specialist
description:
**Build the Future of Technology with Professional Galaxy AB**


Join a network of talented engineers, developers, cloud specialists, and AI innovators working on impactful projects across Sweden and Europe. At Professional Galaxy AB, we connect top tech talent with companies driving digital transformation in areas like cloud computing, software engineering, data, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. Explore exciting opportunities and grow your career while working with cutting-edge technologies and forward-thinking teams.


We are now seeking a **Technical Process Safety Specialist** for a major industrial project. Your role is critical in supporting the safe and compliant design and operation of the project’s assets. You contribute with expertise to ensure that all facilities are designed with a strong focus on safety, minimizing risks to staff, contractors, and the surrounding community. This involves close collaboration with design & engineering consultants, contractors, and equipment vendors to review and validate safety aspects of the design. You will contribute to the development and application of safety standards for the project, aligned with applicable regulatory requirements and industry best practices.


The Technical Process Safety Specialist will report to the Technical Process Safety Lead under the Central Engineering Department Organization. This position is **based at our Stockholm office**, with flexibility to **work and travel to the project site in Boden as required**.

**Responsibilities:**

* Supporting Design Safety: Contribute to ensuring that the design of all project facilities prioritizes safety and minimizes risks, including reviewing and validating safety aspects with engineering contractors and equipment vendors.
* Applying Safety Standards: Support the development, interpretation, and implementation of safety standards based on regulatory requirements and industry best practices. Ensure consistent application across the project.
* Regulatory Requirements Analysis: Collaborate with regulatory bodies and third-party specialists to identify and understand relevant regulatory requirements. Stay updated on applicable regulations and support interpretation of their impact on the project.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with engineering teams, contractors, vendors, and regulatory bodies to ensure alignment on safety requirements. Contribute to effective communication of safety-related information and support resolution of compliance-related questions.
* Supporting Compliance Activities: Participate in monitoring, reviews, inspections, and audits as needed to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and safety standards.

**Qualifications:**

* Engineering degree, MSc, in a relevant discipline (preference for Chemical Engineering)
* At least 10 years’ experience in large-scale industrial projects (50 MUSD+) and/or site experience (steel mill, mining, paper mill, utilities generation, LNG, Hydrogen, Oil & Gas, petrochemicals, refinery, etc.), with a minimum of five years in a technical process safety-related role. Steel plant experience is an advantage.
* Experience in HAZID, HAZOP, LOPA, SIL, QRA, Risk Assessments, Functional Safety, BAT, Occupational Safety, Hazards, Fire Safety, ATEX, Hazardous Area Classification, and Effects Management
* Additional experience in Noise Study, Consequence Analysis, Action Error Analysis, Interface Assessment, Machine Safety is an advantage
* Experience with hydrogen systems, LNG, or metal industry in major projects is a strong advantage
* Knowledge of relevant Swedish / European / EU / international standards, laws, and regulations related to technical process and industrial safety
* Knowledge of relevant permitting systems and consent-to-operate processes for major industrial plants
* Swedish language proficiency is mandatory

**Application Details:**

* Offer deadline: 2026-04-03
* Start date: 2026-04-03
* End date: Open


Are you the right person for this assignment, or would you like to recommend a strong candidate?


Please apply directly through our system with:

* Your updated CV
* Availability to start the assignment


In your motivation, describe why you are suitable for this assignment refer to previous consulting assignments, employment, education, and personal qualities.


Please note: Applications via email are **not accepted**. All applications must be sent through the portal to be valid. Assignments are offered continuously, so we recommend applying immediately.

title: Guest service agents - Sommaranställning
description:
*Grand Hôtel är en plats där personalen gör skillnad och tillsammans skapar vi, med passion och stolthet, minnesvärda upplevelser för våra gäster. Grand Hôtel är ett helägt dotterbolag till FAM AB och det enda hotellet i Sverige som är med i Leading Hotels of the World.*

***OM ROLLEN***


Vi på Grand Hôtel letar just nu efter flera Guest service agents till vår boutique Grand Affections under vår mest intensiva period: sommaren. Vi söker efter en person som kan arbeta 100% mellan 1:a maj till 30:e september. För rätt person kommer det finnas mycket goda möjligheter till en extraanställning även efter säsongens slut.


Grand Affections är en liten boutique som gäster och kunder besöker för att hitta det där lilla extra. Placerad mitt i vår lobby erbjuder den sin lilla yta till trots allt man kan tänkas behöva för att förgylla vardagen, så som smycken, skor och kläder men även vårt eget te och egenproducerad honung. Vi samarbetar även med olika leverantörer och märken för att erbjuda ett varierat och förstklassigt sortiment.


Grand Affections är en del av vårat Front Office och är även hotellets växel dit alla inkommande samtal kommer.


Butiken är öppen mellan 08:00 på morgonen till 20:00 på kvällen, arbetstiden är förlänga i enlighet med butikens öppettider.


I rollen som guest service agent följande uppgifter:

* Växelansvar: Svara och koppla varje enskilt samtal till rätt person på ett professionellt och effektivt sätt enligt våra standards
* Försäljning och kassahantering
* Prismärkning och påfyllnad av varor
* Ge rekommendationer och vara behjälplig för butikens kunder
* Hålla sig uppdaterad och kunnig om alla hotellet delar för att kunna hjälpa och hänvisa våra gäster på ett korrekt vis
* Handha förfrågningar om telefoni och gästservicefrågor
* Vid behov: In och utcheckning av gäster

**VEM ÄR DU?**


Vi värdesätter personliga egenskaper högt och söker dig som har en genuin känsla för service. Dina egenskaper inkluderar en glad och varm personlighet, noggrannhet i utförande av arbetsuppgifter och förmågan att trivas i en ibland hektisk arbetsmiljö. Du måste vara flexibel och kunna anpassa dig till föränderliga situationer samt vara en problemlösare som trivs i ett snabbt tempo.


Vidare ser vi även att du har:

* Minst ett års tidigare arbetslivserfarenhet inom detaljhandeln eller hotell.
* Flexibel gällande arbetstider och har möjlighet att arbeta större delen av sommaren
* Flytande och bekväm att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på både engelska och svenska
* Övriga språkkunskaper är meriterande
* Tidigare arbete med hotellsystemet Opera Cloud är meriterande

**VI ERBJUDER**


Vi erbjuder inte bara en roll utan en möjlighet att vara en del av en exceptionell gästupplevelse där varje dag är en ny möjlighet att skapa magi!

* Anställning på 100% mellan 1:a maj - 30:e september. Möjlighet att arbeta extra både innan och efter.
* En spännande utmaning och stimulerande arbete i Sveriges mest ikoniska hotell med över 300 anställda.
* En internationell arbetsplats med en levande kultur och stor mångfald bland både kollegor och gäster
* Arbetsplatsen är placerad på hotellet där vi har högt i tak och en stor variation i arbetsuppgifter
* Lön enligt avtal
* Tillträde enligt överenskommelse


Som en del av processen utför vi bakgrundskontroller.


Vi motser din ansökan senast den 30/4, urval och intervjuer sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.

title: Accounting Revenue Manager
description:
**Location**  

Our **Accounting Revenue Manager** will be an integral part of our global Finance organization. This role is based remotely in the UK, Ireland, Estonia or Sweden.


**About DoiT**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.



Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.



With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Opportunity**  

As **Accounting Revenue Manager,** you will own and lead the global revenue accounting function, serving as the subject-matter expert for revenue recognition while driving operational excellence and scalability. This is a senior, hands-on leadership role responsible for both execution and strategy.



You will oversee day-to-day revenue accounting activities, guide complex technical accounting decisions, optimize NetSuite and related systems, and partner cross-functionally to support business growth. This role requires strong technical expertise, sound judgment, and the ability to lead in an evolving, global SaaS environment.


**Key Responsibilities**  

Revenue Accounting Leadership


* Own and oversee global revenue recognition processes in compliance with ASC 606 / IFRS 15.
* Act as the primary authority on revenue accounting matters, providing guidance on complex or non-standard transactions.
* Review customer contracts, pricing models, and deal structures to ensure appropriate revenue treatment.
* Ensure consistent application of revenue policies across regions, entities, and revenue streams.


Close, Reporting & Controls


* Lead monthly, quarterly, and annual revenue close processes, ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.
* Oversee deferred revenue, unbilled receivables, contract assets, and contract liabilities.
* Develop, maintain, and enhance revenue accounting policies, procedures, and internal controls.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for external auditors on revenue-related matters.


Systems, Automation & Scale


* Own revenue-related processes and configurations within NetSuite, including revenue modules and reporting.
* Partner with Finance Systems, IT, and Operations to drive system enhancements, integrations, and automation.
* Support ERP, billing, CRM, and revenue automation implementations and improvements.
* Ensure data integrity and scalability across revenue systems as the business grows.
* Cross-Functional Business Partnering
* Partner closely with Sales, Legal, Deal Desk, Billing, and FP&A on deal structuring, forecasting, and revenue implications.
* Provide revenue insights, analytics, and reporting to Finance leadership and FP&A.
* Support strategic initiatives by translating business changes into accounting and system impacts.


People Leadership


* Manage, mentor, and develop revenue accounting team members (where applicable).
* Set clear goals, review deliverables, and foster a culture of accountability and continuous improvement.
* Build scalable team processes, documentation, and knowledge-sharing practices.


**Qualifications**


* CPA / Chartered Accountant or equivalent professional certification.
* 6+ years of progressive accounting experience, including 3+ years focused on revenue accounting.
* Deep expertise in ASC 606 / IFRS 15.
* Experience in SaaS, cloud, or technology environments.
* Hands-on experience with NetSuite, including revenue modules and reporting.
* Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills.
* Fluent in English (written and spoken).
* Experience working in global, multi-entity, multi-currency environments.
* Highly analytical, detail-oriented, and able to balance execution with strategic thinking.


**Bonus Points**


* Experience with usage-based or consumption revenue models.
* Experience with Salesforce, billing platforms, or revenue automation tools.
* Prior people management or team leadership experience.
* Experience operating across multiple jurisdictions and regulatory environments.


**Are you a Do'er?**  

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.



We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.


What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge, and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.



Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.



We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.



Full-time employee benefits include:


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.

title: Implementation Manager
description:
**About Surikat**
-----------------


Surikat is a fast-growing SaaS company transforming the logistics ecosystem. Our suite of cloud-based applications helps ports, terminals, and logistics providers streamline operations, gain real-time visibility, and improve efficiency across the supply chain. To further strengthen our team, we are now looking for an **Implementation Manager** who will ensure our customers are successfully onboarded and realize maximum value from our solutions.

**Role Overview**
-----------------


As an **Implementation Manager**, you will lead customer onboarding projects from start to finish. You’ll be the primary point of contact for customers during the project phase, ensuring smooth implementation, configuration, and rollout of the Surikat platform. You will work closely with our product, engineering, and customer success teams while guiding customers through best practices in operational digitization. You will help leading and high profile logistics enterprises around the world with truly business critical operations.


This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of technology, operations, and customer engagement.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Own and manage end-to-end customer implementation projects.
* Collaborate with customer stakeholders to understand operational workflows and business objectives, and translate that into best practice setup of our SaaS offering.
* Effectively steer and coach project members to ensure qualitative and timely deliveries.
* Document Solution proposals and specifications and ensure project scope is clear and aligned between all parties.
* Configure Surikat applications to align with customer needs and operational KPIs.
* Develop and manage project plans, timelines, and delivery milestones.
* Manage project budget and commercials
* Facilitate workshops, training sessions, and UAT cycles.
* Proactively identify risks, dependencies, and process improvements.
* Ensure customers achieve a smooth go-live and transition to Customer Success.
* Provide input to product teams based on customer feedback and implementation insights.

**What We’re Looking For**
--------------------------

* Relevant experience in software implementation, project management, or solution delivery (SaaS preferred).
* Excellent communication and stakeholder-management skills.
* Strong functional/business process aptitude and the ability to translate business needs into system configurations.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously in a dynamic environment.
* Comfortable leading workshops, training, and working with both operational and IT teams.
* Self-driven mindset with a passion for helping customers succeed.
* Background in logistics, supply-chain, maritime, or freight operations is not a hard requirement but a strong plus.
* Business minded and result driven
* Possibility to travel for customer activities (workshops, trainings, go-live and hypercare)
* Fluent in English and Swedish, spoken and written

  

As Implementation Manager you report to our Head of Implementation. The position is full-time and to succeed (and have the most fun) in this role you should be able to work most of the time from our stunning office in Gothenburg.

**Why Surikat?**
----------------

  

Surikat is a fast-growing B2B SaaS company providing innovative and truly business critical solutions for supply-chain and logistics management. We’re investing in people, culture, and processes to support sustainable scale. At Surikat, we’re combining a rich history and stable and profitable business model with the agility, energy, and collaborative culture of a startup. You’ll find a supportive environment with colleagues who have extensive knowledge and experience within the industry, and will be able to play a big part in keeping our positive momentum going.


Our beautiful office is centrally located, close to buses, trams, and trains — and it might just have Gothenburg’s best view.

title: Avropare
description:
**NOTE Norrtelje AB**



Omfattning: Heltid



Varaktighet: Tillsvidare



Anställningsform: Tillsvidare- eller tidsbegränsad anställning


**Krav på Kvalifikationer**


* God administrativ förmåga och vana att arbeta i ERP/MPS System
* Strukturerad
* God kommunikationsförmåga
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, tal och skrift
* Starkt meriterande med erfarenhet av inköp, avrop eller beställningsprocesser


**Utbildning**


* Gymnasial utbildning


**Språk**


* Svenska
* Engelska


**Om jobbet**



NOTE är en av norra Europas ledande tillverkningspartner för elektronik och kompletta produkter.



Vi söker nu en inköpare till fabriken i Norrtälje.



NOTE Norrtelje AB är en av Norrtäljes största privata arbetsgivare.



Vi ingår i NOTE koncernen som är ett svenskägt, börsnoterat EMS bolag med en omsättning på ungefär 4 miljarder kronor och över 1500 anställda fördelat på 12 fabriker i Sverige, Europa och Kina.



Här är vi närmare 200 anställda och strukturen baseras på dedikerade team, där vi arbetar nära varandra och kunden. Detta bidrar till en god teamkänsla och likasåväl ett starkt engagemang till att hela tiden leva upp till våra kunders förväntningar.



Våra leverantörer finns representerade över hela värden varför det är viktigt med goda kunskaper i engelska. Vi använder IFS Cloud som vårt affärssystem och erfarenhet av detta är klart meriterande. Som person är du självgående, noggrann och strukturerad och trivs med eget ansvar. Du är van att arbeta i team med många kontaktytor och kan uttrycka dig affärsmässigt i båda svenska och engelska.



Vi erbjuder en betydelsefull roll i ett härligt team.



Du kommer att ingå i vårt inköpsteam, vilka primärt arbetar med materialförsörjningen till produktionen.



Förutom leverantörsdialog så kommer du ha tät dialog med övriga operativa funktioner i organisationen.



Du rapporterar till vår inköpschef och kommer ha många kontaktytor såväl internt som externt med våra leverantörer. Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter innefattar följande:


* Avropa artiklar mot behov i ERP-systemet, hantering av prognoser etc
* Leveransbevakning
* Tidigare eller senarelägga material, utefter behovsbilden
* Bevaka att ordererkännande uppdateras i ERP-systemet
* Tillsammans med inköpsavdelningen kontinuerligt arbeta med att vidareutveckla våra inköpsprocesser.


Välkommen med din ansökan till joakim.henriksson@note-ems.com eller till Careers.norrtelje.com

title: Machine Learning /AI Engineer (Senior to Principal Level)
description:
We're an award-winning Google Cloud partner. We're the experts in transforming businesses and shaping the future of cloud technology. Join us and collaborate with top minds, build groundbreaking solutions, and make a real difference for our clients. Enjoy extensive professional development, global reach, and a supportive, Google-inspired culture. If you're passionate about the cloud, this is where you want to be.
   

  

 With over 14 years of experience in Google Cloud under our belt, offices in 18 countries and more than 600 experts, we have deployed practical innovation alongside Google. We focus on infrastructure modernisation, data management, smart analytics, application modernisation, and AI & machine learning.
   

  

 Curious about our projects? We got you: Check out our success stories
   

  

**Job Description**
**Day-to-day life**
* Design, develop, and deploy cutting-edge machine learning models – crafting bespoke AI solutions for our Nordic clients.
* Collaborate with data scientists, data engineers, and Google experts to overcome complex challenges and deliver impactful outcomes.
* Champion knowledge sharing and mentorship, guiding junior colleagues in the art of machine learning and fostering a culture of continuous learning.
* Stay at the forefront of Google Cloud AI/ML technologies, continuously expanding your expertise and exploring new possibilities.
* Confidently present solutions to clients, bridging the gap between complex algorithms and real-world business value, while actively cultivating and expanding those customer relationships.


 Want to know more? Check out our people stories on Youtube
   

  

**Qualifications**
 We're seeking a passionate and experienced ML Engineer with a proven track record in designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models. You'll be a cloud enthusiast with a deep understanding of AI/ML principles and hands-on experience with cloud technologies. As a coding expert, you'll possess strong Python skills and a solid foundation in machine learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, LangGraph).
   

  

 Excellent communication is essential – you'll build strong relationships with clients, translate their needs into innovative AI solutions, and present complex topics with clarity and confidence. You're a true collaborator, thriving in team environments where knowledge sharing and mutual support are paramount.
   

  

 Fluency in English and one of the Scandinavian languages (Swedish, Norwegian, or Danish) is required
   

  

**Additional Information**
**Why Choose Devoteam G Cloud?**
* Own the AI revolution: Dive into the exciting world of Generative AI and ML, playing a pivotal role in shaping projects around Google's groundbreaking Gemini foundation model.
* Innovative Impact: Work on the forefront of cloud technology at a globally recognized leader in Google Cloud solutions.
* Direct Google Connection: Collaborate closely with Google teams, shaping the future of cloud and AI.
* Unleash Your Expertise: Thrive in a fast-paced environment where sharing knowledge and success is paramount.
* End-to-End Impact: Drive complete business transformations, from strategy to implementation and beyond.
* Accelerate Your Career: Grow within a Google-inspired culture, gaining specialisations and certifications.


 We do plenty of activities, like meet-ups, hackathons, and partnerships. Don’t lose any of them: follow us on LinkedIn
   

  

**Benefits**
* Encouragement and support for training and certification, in the form of coaching from other team members, cost coverage, and financial incentives.
* Challenging and rewarding assignments, many of which are end-to-end.
* A hybrid work model as standard, with flexible working hours and location to support your work-life balance.
* An international, diverse, and inclusive team.
* A human-centric and value-based company culture.
* Wellness grants for sports activities (5,000 SEK/year).
* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Full provision of work tools.
* A variety of social events.


 Want to know more about life at Devoteam? Check our Instagram page
   

  

 Ready to join an elite team? Apply for our Machine Learning & AI Engineer position and become part of something exceptional!
   

  

 Is this not the right position for you? Don’t worry, we have plenty of opportunities! Check out our Career page

title: Solution Architect - Graduate
description:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE partner/customer office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Office of the CTO (Sweden)**
**Location:** 
 Stockholm or Gothenburg (Hybrid)
 **Team:** 
 CTO Office
   

  

 The
 **Office of the CTO** 
 is the technical "think-tank" of our organization. Based in our
 **Stockholm** 
 or
 **Gothenburg** 
 hubs, you will join a high-impact team responsible for defining the technical vision that keeps us at the forefront of the Swedish technology landscape.
   

  

 In this role, you will act as a bridge between emerging local trends and our long-term technical strategy. You aren’t just following a roadmap—you are helping to identify the milestones that will define our success in Sweden for years to come.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strategic Tech Scouting: Proactively analyze emerging technologies (e.g., AI, Sustainable Tech, Edge Computing) specifically within the Swedish innovation landscape to identify new opportunities.
* Innovation Insights: Distill complex technical developments into clear, high-level briefings for leadership, providing a "Sweden-first" perspective on our strategic direction.
* Ecosystem Engagement: Act as a technical ambassador to Swedish research institutes, universities, and industry partners, fostering the collaborations that drive local innovation.
* Executive Storytelling: Create compelling narratives and presentations that translate our technical vision for Swedish customers and internal stakeholders.
* Strategic Projects: Support the CTO leadership on high-priority initiatives that require a blend of technical curiosity and strategic thinking.


**Your Profile**
* Academic Background: Recently completed/graduated (graduation within the last 12 months) from a Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Engineering Physics, Industrial Management, or a related field from a Swedish technical university.
* The "Strategic Generalist": You have a broad interest in how different technologies (Cloud, Security, Data) intersect to solve the unique challenges of the Swedish market.
* Analytical Mindset: You excel at taking "noisy" information and distilling it into clear, actionable insights for decision-makers.
* Communication: Exceptional English skills are required. Proficiency in Swedish is essential for engaging effectively with the local tech ecosystem and partners.
* Curiosity & Ambiguity: You thrive on the "fuzzy front end" of technology where the answers aren't always clear and the horizon is always moving.


**Why Join the CTO Office in Sweden?**
* Local Impact, Global Context: Gain a unique view of how a global tech leader operates, while staying deeply connected to the Swedish tech community.
* Direct Mentorship: Work closely with senior technical leaders and architects in our Swedish offices who are shaping the future of the industry.
* Collaborative Culture: Enjoy the flat hierarchy, transparency, and innovation-led environment of our Stockholm and Gothenburg teams.
* Career Launchpad: This role is a premier entry point for those aspiring to future leadership roles in technical strategy


**What We’d Prefer You Bring**
* The drive to seek out what’s next and to deliver exceptional results
* A collaborative, solution focused spirit and overall sense of urgency
* The desire to embrace new ideas and fresh thinking and seek out ideas different than your own
* Experience as an active leader on campus who strives to make a positive impact on the world
* Comfort with working in a hybrid (virtual and face-to-face) environment
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills and the ability to ask smart questions


**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Initial extensive onboarding to support you with adjusting into the role
* Ongoing learning and development throughout the duration of the program
* Be mentored by at least one senior member of the team and after two years in the program you can grow into a true professional with valuable relationships and international working experience
* Competitive salary and great benefits
* Great work-life balance including hybrid working and Wellness Fridays initiative


**At HPE, We’re**
* Human Rights Campaign’s 2023-2024 Corporate Equality Index
* Great Place to Work’s Best Workplace for Parents 2023
* Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® 2024
* Ethisphere World’s Most Ethical Company 2024
* The Civic 50 Honoree
* JUST Jobs Leader 2024
* Forbes 2024 America’s Best Employers For Diversity
* America's Most Just Companies 2024
* Fortune Best Workplaces in Texas™ 2024
* Bay Area's Best Places to Work 2024


**Want to learn more about Digital Sales careers at HPE?**
 Try our new virtual experience program, where you can explore what’s next for you in this role and earn shareable completion certificates that stand out to HPE recruiters and hiring managers. https://careers.hpe.com/us/en/students-virtual-experiences
   

  

**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Action Planning, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business, Calendar Management, Coaching, Computer Literacy, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Group Problem Solving, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Office Administration, Policy and procedures, Recordkeeping, Risk Assessment, Software Development {+ 5 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

**Job**
 Administration
   

  

**Job Level**
 Entry
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors
 **will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process.** 
 The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.*

title: Consultant Trainee Data, Analytics & AI
description:
**Do you want to kick start your career within Data, Analytics and AI? Look no further - Data Edge is the place to be!** 




  





 We are now starting up our
 **Edge Academy (trainee program),** 
 where you and two other freshly graduated stars will really accelerate your career with education, certifications, mentorship and of course, high impact client delivery during 12 rewarding months.
 



  





**What is the Edge Academy?** 



* A 12 month program where you parallel with delivering value adding projects at interesting clients, also will be developing your skills set.
* Education and practical skill development within our three different Practices (competence areas) - Business development, Data and Analytics.
* Dedicated mentor and development dialogues.
* Access to our internal GCP and Azure environments to make hands-on development and try new tools and technologies.
* Possibilities to take certifications.
* The academy ends with a pro bono “examination” project where your acquired skills are put to the test - in order to create real world impact.



  





**But who are we at Data Edge?** 




 Our ambition is to create a leading consulting company in the intersection between Business development, Analytics and Data. In order to succeed with that we need great people that want constant learning, are curious, have high integrity and love teamwork. Above all, share our passion about creating lasting business value through data and analysis.
 



 Us who work at Data Edge have many years of experience in data, analysis and data-driven transformation from leading consulting and tech companies and know what is needed to realize business value through data. Our ambition is to be the given choice for organizations that need to bridge the gap between business and technology, from strategy to implementation.
 



 At Data Edge, we strive to live by our values: Passion for Data, Integrity, and Teamwork.
 



  





**What We Offer** 



* A well thought program to quickly gain important experience and skills for a great career within Data, Analytics and AI.
* The opportunity to be part of a team that is committed to developing within the field. We invest in our growth through initiatives such as internal knowledge sharing and participation in external seminars/events.
* A diverse range of challenges, both with clients and within our own company development. You will be instrumental in building a company where you will have significant impact and involvement.
* A clear niche and broad network that will ensure engaging and rewarding projects within the field.



  





**What We Are Looking For** 




 Since we don’t expect you to have vast experience or knowledge with our area, we mainly will look at your potential to become a great consultant at Data Edge. Below are a few things we are looking for:
 


* **Education:** 
 You have a University degree, preferable within computer science, industrial engineering, applied mathematics or similar
* **Interest or experience within Data, Analytics and AI:** 
 You could have some working experience (1-2 years) within this area or have done side projects within these areas:
* Data Engineering
* Data analytics
* ML/AI development
* **Location & Eligibility:** 
 You are based in Stockholm and legally eligible to work in Sweden.
* **Interest in Building the Company:** 
 We also hope that you are interested in continuing to build Data Edge!



  





**Deadline for application** 
 : 17th of April
 



**Start date** 
 : 26th of August

title: AI Engineer
description:
**Start:** 
 As soon as possible
   

  

**Duration:** 
 Full-time, initial 12-month contract with the possibility of extension
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

 We are now looking for an experienced
 **AI Engineer** 
 to one of our clients. You will be part of a cutting-edge AI team focused on building advanced agent-based systems that enhance how organizations work, learn, and access knowledge. This role offers a greenfield opportunity to shape how AI agents plan, reason, and execute tasks across complex enterprise environments.
   

  

 Working at the intersection of agent architecture, prompt and tool engineering, and scalable infrastructure, you will design systems that can operate reliably in real-world scenarios. Success in this role means building robust, scalable, and enterprise-ready agent architectures, where effective context and tool utilization enable intelligent behavior at scale. You will contribute to establishing clear evaluation metrics and continuously improving system performance, while ensuring that quality, safety, and reliability are measurable and steadily advancing. Ultimately, your work will result in durable, reusable technical foundations that accelerate innovation and unlock new capabilities across teams.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* Design and implement multi-step planning, orchestration, and tool-routing capabilities for AI agents
* Develop code-generation agents and enable secure, sandboxed execution environments
* Build and optimize memory, state handling, and contextual reasoning strategies
* Balance performance factors such as latency, quality, and cost efficiency
* Implement robust error handling, fallback mechanisms, and graceful degradation
* Collaborate with platform and search teams to create reusable and scalable agent infrastructure
* Contribute to safety frameworks and measurable improvements in system quality


**Job requirements**
 We are looking for someone with strong technical expertise and a passion for building high-quality systems in a fast-moving environment.
   

  

* Experience in backend or full-stack development using modern technologies such as TypeScript, Kotlin, or Node.js
* Familiarity with frontend frameworks (e.g. React) is a plus
* Experience working with databases such as PostgreSQL or Redis
* Knowledge of cloud infrastructure and tooling (e.g. GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform)
* Strong understanding of system design, scalability, and production-grade infrastructure
* Experience or strong interest in AI systems, agent architectures, or LLM-based applications
* Ability to balance technical trade-offs such as performance, cost, and reliability
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively across teams


**Application procedure**
 A Maandag® recruiter will assess your application as soon as possible to determine whether you are suitable for an open position.
   

  

**About The Company**
 If you are a good match, we would like to receive a CV in WORD format with motivation why you fit this assignment, your availability and any scheduled holidays.
   

  

 Why Maandag Nordic? With us, you’ll get the chance to really put your ideas into action. We offer a work environment where you can grow and learn through hands-on experience - trying things out, making mistakes, and improving.
   

  

 For more than 35 years, Maandag® has been at the forefront of empowering people and organisations. We not only help professionals get jobs, but also connect them with a future that matches their values, desires and ambitions. Because when people are truly in the right place, they can develop themselves, fulfil their dreams and go to work with fresh energy every day. The energy and power released in the process is a catalyst for growth for companies. We started in the Netherlands, but now we also help professionals and organisations in Belgium, Poland, Dubai and Sweden. Our extensive knowledge of different markets, coupled with our wide network, enables us to make perfect matches quickly.

title: IT-konsult inom Data Center till B2B IT-partner
description:
*Är du i början av din karriär inom infrastruktur och vill växa in i en konsultroll? Här får du chansen att utvecklas och ta steg mot att bli expert inom datacenter och servermiljöer.* 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Det här är ett konsultuppdrag med goda möjligheter till överrekrytering. I den här rollen får du initialt en anställning hos Bravura, och det är uttalat att B2B IT-partner har för avsikt att erbjuda dig anställning hos dem på sikt. Detta ger både dig och B2B IT-partner en bra möjlighet att lära känna varandra samt utvärdera hur ni trivs med ert samarbete.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 B2B IT-Partner är ett etablerat IT‑bolag som arbetar med datacenter, arbetsplatstjänster, nätverk och moderna hybrida miljöer. De har funnits i över 20 år och stöttar både mindre verksamheter och stora bolag med allt från serverdrift och lagring till avancerade plattformstjänster.
 



 Teamet du blir en del av arbetar inom nätverk och infrastruktur och kännetecknas av nära samarbete, högt engagemang och ett tydligt fokus på service. Alla sitter tillsammans på kontoret i Solna, och du får tillgång till både kompetens, stöd och moderna lösningar att utvecklas i.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 I rollen som IT-konsult inom Data Center arbetar du brett med uppdrag kopplade till datacenter och infrastruktur. Du hanterar installationer, förändringar, felsökning och förbättringar i olika kundmiljöer och får successivt mer ansvar när du växer in i rollen. Din vardag varierar mellan arbete på plats hos kund och uppgifter som hanteras remote.
 



  





 Du kommer att arbeta med Windows Server och vanliga infrastrukturtjänster, bidra vid implementationer i server- och virtualiseringsmiljöer och delta i underhållsarbete kring storage, backup, patchning och uppgraderingar. Du får felsöka incidenter, analysera grundorsaker och dokumentera lösningar. I rollen ingår även kunddialoger, där du på sikt fungerar som tekniskt bollplank i enklare frågor. Arbetet sker nära seniora kollegor som du kan följa med ut på uppdrag tills du är självgående. Du blir en del av ett team som jobbar inom nätverk och infrastruktur och där du får tydlig coaching och möjlighet att utvecklas snabbt.
 



  





 Du kommer bland annat att:
 


* Hjälpa till vid implementationer och förändringar i server- och virtualiseringsmiljöer
* Arbeta med Windows Server (AD/DNS/DHCP/GPO) i vardagen och lära dig best practice
* Delta i arbete kring storage/SAN, backup, patchning och uppgraderingar
* Felsöka incidenter, göra rotorsaksanalyser och dokumentera lösningar
* Vara med i kunddialoger och på sikt agera tekniskt bollplank i enklare frågor.



  





**Utbildning, erfarenhet och personliga egenskaper** 



* 3-5 års erfarenhet eller motsvarande kompetens genom praktik/labb
* Grundläggande förståelse för Windows Server och vanliga infrastrukturtjänster (AD/DNS/DHCP)
* Intresse för virtualisering (t.ex. VMware vSphere)
* Förståelse för nätverksgrunder (VLAN, DNS, routing)
* Vana att felsöka metodiskt, dokumentera och följa arbetssätt/process
* Du talar och skriver obehindrat på svenska och engelska
* B‑körkort



  





**Meriterande** 



* Kunskap om storage/SAN (iSCSI/FC)
* Erfarenhet av HP-plattformar
* Backup, t.ex. Veeam
* Grundläggande Linux
* Azure eller annan molnkontakt i hybridmiljöer
* PowerShell eller annan enklare automatisering



  





 Du är nyfiken, ansvarstagande och tycker om att förstå hur teknik hänger ihop. Du trivs i en roll där du får växa genom praktiskt arbete och där du samarbetar med andra.
